Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: sliced radishes, toasted shelled pumpkin seeds (pepitas), cilantro sprigs, and lime wedges (for serving)

instructions: Cotija cheese is available at Latin markets and some supermarkets.

Preheat broiler. Place poblano chile on a broiler-proof rimmed baking sheet and broil, turning occasionally, until charred in spots and blistered all over, 6–8 minutes. Transfer to a bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and let steam 10 minutes. Remove skin, stem, and seeds; discard. Pulse poblano, onion, garlic, arugula, and cilantro in a food processor until very finely chopped.

Combine tortilla chips and milk in a large bowl; let stand until chips soften, about 5 minutes. Mix in poblano mixture, eggs, and cheese; season with salt and pepper. Gently fold in beef. Form mixture into 1½”-diameter balls (2 Tbsp. each; makes about 40) and chill at least 4 hours.

Place ancho chiles in a small bowl and add boiling water to cover. Let sit until softened, about 15 minutes. Drain chiles. Purée chiles, onion, garlic, cumin, 2 cups broth, 1 Tbsp. oil, and 1 Tbsp. sugar in a blender until smooth, adding more broth by the tablespoonful to thin sauce as needed (should be consistency of whole milk); season chile sauce with salt, pepper, and additional 1 Tbsp. sugar, if sauce is too bitter.

Heat remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Working in batches, cook meatballs, turning occasionally, until brown all over, 8–10 minutes. Transfer meatballs to a Dutch oven or other large heavy pot and add chile sauce. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer, turning meatballs halfway through and adding more broth if needed (sauce should come up to about ¾ sides of meatballs), until meatballs are cooked through and sauce is slightly thickened, 15–20 minutes.
Meanwhile, whisk sour cream and lime juice in a small bowl; season with salt.
Serve meatballs with lime sour cream, Cotija cheese, radishes, pumpkin seeds, cilantro, and lime wedges.

DO AHEAD: Red chile sauce can be made 3 days ahead. Meatballs can be formed up to 1 day ahead. Cover both separately and chill. Meatballs can be cooked in chile sauce 1 day ahead. Reheat before serving, adding chicken broth or water as needed to thin sauce.

alcohol-free-mojitos.name: Alcohol-free Mojitos
instructions: Combine 2 cups water and the sugar in a microwave-safe bowl; heat in microwave on High for 5 minutes. Stir the mint into the water; let stand for 5 minutes. Strain and discard the mint leaves from the syrup; set aside.

Stir the lime sherbet, lime juice, and 1 cup water together in a large pitcher until well combined. Pour the mint-infused syrup into the mixture. Add club soda and stir. Serve over ice. Garnish with lime slices.

alentejo-abbots-ears-teleculinaria.name: Alentejo Abbot's Ears
instructions: In a bowl, mix thoroughly all the ingredients indicated until you form a ball of dough.
Mold cookies in the shape of an ear and dispose of them on a tray sprinkled with flour. Brush with beaten egg and put it in the oven, preheated to 180°C, until they are golden.

alentejo-boleima-teleculinaria.name: Alentejo Boleima
instructions: Put the flour, sugar, and lemon shaving in a bowl. Open a cavity in the center and put the yeast in it, previously dissolved in the milk. Add the eggs, knead everything very well, until you get a homogeneous mass, then cover and let it leave till it gets twice the volume.
Peel the apples, peel them, cut them into blades and reserve. After leavening, knead the dough again, divide it into 4 equal pieces and stretch them in rectangular shape.
On a tray, greased with olive oil, have the layers of dough interspersed with the apple blades, dusting each layer with a mixture of sugar and cinnamon.

Brush the last layer (which should be mass) with the yolk, previously mixed with milk, and sprinkle with more sugar and cinnamon. Take it to the oven, preheated at 180°C, for about 45 minutes or until it gets golden. Remove from the oven and serve cut into squares.

alentejo-croaker-teleculinaria.name: Alentejo Croaker
instructions: Fix the lamb posts, season them with vinegar, salt and pepper and let it rest for 30 minutes. Then cook the lamb in 4 dl of water, remove and reserve the fish and broth from the cooking.

Take the slices of bread to toast. Peel and wash your garlic teeth and pick them finely. Take a pot to the fire with the olive oil, let it warm, add the garlic and let it saute, stirring always. Sprinkle with the flour, stir until it is brownish and add the broth that you have reserved, slowly and always stirring until thickened and without clumps.

Remove from the fire, add some more vinegar if you like and a branch of cilantro and pass with the wand. Take the pot back to the fire, let it boil, add the lamb posts, cover and let it cook for 15 minutes in mild heat. Then serve the fish with the sauce and the slices of toasted bread and decorate to taste.

alentejo-dogfish-soup-teleculinaria.name: Alentejo Dogfish Soup
instructions: Cook the cactus in the salt-tempered water until the fish drop from the spine. Book the cation and water.

Hustle and mince the garlic. Pinch the cilantro too. Put the olive oil in a pot, let it warm, add garlic and half the cilantro and let it shine a little. Add the broth from the fish cooking and let it boil.
In a bowl, pour the flour, vinegar and 2 tablespoons (soup) of the previous broth and undo it with the help of a fork. Add this prepared to the pot, in yarn and stirring so as not to gain clumps.
Have the bread slices at the bottom of a bowl. Put over the fish and then the broth very hot. Sprinkle with the remaining cilantros and serve.

alentejo-pine-teleculinaria.name: Alentejo Pine
instructions: Spread the pine nuts on a tray and roast them in the oven, preheated to 180oC. Remove and reserve.
Light a pot with the honey and let it boil until it thickens. Add the pine nuts, stir and remove from the fire.
Deite o preparado sobre uma folha de papel vegetal siliconizado. Cubra com outra folha e passe por cima o rolo da massa para alisar e ficar mais fino.
Take off the top sheet and let it dry a little. Then take off the bottom sheet, then cut into pieces and let it dry completely overnight. Serve right away.

alentejo-soup-teleculinaria.name: Alentejo Soup
instructions: Cook the cod posts in water, drain them and let them drool. Remove their skin and spines, chip them and reserve. Pass the broth of the cooking through a network pusher and book as well.

Descasque e pique finamente os alhos; pique grosseiramente os coentros. Leve ao lume um tacho com o azeite, deixe aquecer, junte os dentes de alho e deixe alourar. Adicione, de seguida, os coentros, o caldo do bacalhau e o bacalhau lascado, tempere com sal e pimenta e deixe cozinhar durante 10 minutos.
Cut the bread into thin slices and distribute them into deep dishes or bowls. Add the cod soup and serve immediately.

alentejo-style-cod-soup-teleculinaria.name: Alentejo-style Cod Soup
instructions: Take to the fire a pot with water, salt and blond. When it starts to boil, add the eggs one by one and let it scalp. Remove them with a skimmer and reserve.
Cook the cod in the same water, remove it also with a skimmer and strain the water. Let the cod cool down a little, eliminate the spines and skin and chip it.

Peel and pinch the garlic well and praise them slightly in a pot with the oil and the feet of the chopped coriander. Water with cod broth and boil for 5 minutes. In the end, season with pepper, add the leaves of chopped cilantros, stir and remove from the fire.

Distribute the sliced bread and chipped cod into bowls. Lay the poached eggs on top and water with the broth. Cover soups with adhesive film and wait 5 minutes. Dispose of the film and, if necessary, add a little more broth. Serve right away.

alentejo-style-coriander-octopus-telecul.name: Alentejo-style Coriander Octopus
alentejo-style-coriander-octopus-telecul.original_name: Polvo de coentrada à moda do Alentejo

ingredients.item: 500 ml  caldo de cozer o polvo

instructions: Cut the octopus into pieces and reserve. Peel and pinch your garlic teeth. Light a pot with the olive oil, chopped garlic and the laurel leaf and let it shine. Add the octopus and stir.

Dissolve the moreena flour in the octopus broth and lie in the pot. Add the lemon juice, chopped corianders, salt, spicy and the colorau. Move and let me see. In the end, correct the seasonings and remove from the fire.
Roll the bread in a toaster or oven and cut it into pieces. Spread the bread on a deep plate and pour the octopus and sauce on top. Decorate with a coriander and serve immediately.

alentejo-style-pork-cheeks-teleculinaria.name: Alentejo-style Pork Cheeks
instructions: Peel and pinch your garlic teeth. Fix the cheeks and cut them into small cubes, put them in a bowl, add the sweet pepper, garlic teeth and white wine, season with salt and pepper and marinate. Light a pot with the lard, add the meat and let it shine.
Add the laurel leaves washed and let cook some more. Meanwhile peel and wash the potatoes, cut them into cubes and fry them in very hot oil.
Add the clams and the marinade of the meat and let cook until the clams open.
Junte a batata frita e envolva. Depois retire, junte as azeitonas, a salsa e os pickles picados e envolva. Decore a gosto e sirva.

alentejo-style-pork-rojoes-teleculinaria.name: Alentejo-style Pork Rojões
instructions: Get the pork, cut it in cubes and dispose of it in a clay pot. Add the garlic pasta and pepper paste, season with the blond leaf, sweet pepper, white wine, salt and spicy. Cover to let marinate overnight in the fridge.
Light a pot with the lard, add the meat and sausage to the slices and let it fry. If necessary, gather slowly, the marinade not to let burn.
Retire do lume, polvilhe com salsa picada e sirva a acompanhar com batata frita.

aleppo-dill-pickles.name: Aleppo Dill Pickles

ingredients.prep: a Middle Eastern spice blend that includes sumac, herbs, and sesame seeds, can be found at Middle Eastern markets, specialty foods stores, and online.

instructions: Pack cucumber and dill into a large heatproof jar. Bring vinegar, sugar, garlic, Aleppo pepper, lemon juice, kosher salt, red pepper flakes, and black pepper to a boil in a medium saucepan, stirring to dissolve sugar. Let cool slightly, then pour brine over cucumbers to submerge. Seal jar and chill at least 30 minutes.
To serve, remove cucumber spears from brine, lightly shaking off excess liquid but leaving on any seasonings; sprinkle with za’atar and sea salt.
Do Ahead: Cucumber can be made 2 days ahead. Remove from brine (do not dry) and chill in an airtight container.

aleppo-pepperroasted-pork-with-shallot-v.name: Aleppo Pepper–roasted Pork With Shallot Vinaigrette

ingredients.item: Aleppo pepper or 2 tbsp. crushed red pepper flakes
Aleppo pepper or 2 tsp. crushed red pepper flakes
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Mix garlic, Aleppo, salt, and sugar in a small bowl; rub over pork. Place in a large roasting pan. Cover and chill 12–24 hours.

Preheat oven to 300°. Uncover pork and roast, basting with drippings every hour or so and covering with foil if browning too quickly, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of pork registers 145° (meat will be very tender but not quite falling off the bone), 6–7 hours. Transfer to a cutting board and let rest at least 30 minutes before slicing.
DO AHEAD: Pork can be roasted 1 day ahead. Let cool; cover and chill. Reheat in a 225° oven (about 1 hour).
Whisk shallots, vinegar, parsley, marjoram, Aleppo pepper, oil, sugar, and 2 Tbsp. water in a medium bowl. Season with salt and black pepper; serve with pork.
DO AHEAD: Vinaigrette can be made 6 hours ahead. Cover and chill.

aleppo-stuffed-recipe-lezzet.name: Aleppo Stuffed Recipe

ingredients.item: You can get a different texture by changing the half of the Pirincin with fine bulgur.
More dense aroma için the amount of spices can improve your taste of göre.
If you want to reduce sour taste, you can have some düşür.
A lighter flavor can reduce the amount of için olive oil.
Pain lovers can be added a small amount of pepper when i&ccedil is spent.
When cooking and cooking the Dolmas ü you can remove the küçü by closing a plate, and you can distract ön.

instructions: 1. To prepare for the preparation of için dry eggplants öthey wash with plenty of water, then sprinkle until softened by boiling water and leave süzüp to the edge.
2. Ö 2 cups of rice, süzün; içine spices, reindeed 2 onions, reindeed 3 teeth wraps, 1 tablespoon of pepper salçanin and dörder tablespoon add olive oil with delicate sour.
3. Prepared iç harç from dry eggplants to iç to fill it in the way it will be a sweet spoon.
4. Do not fill the eggplants completely into the stone; close the mouth parts by pressing it with your hands.
5. Create 1 tablespoon of sal&ccedil with 4 tablespoons of olive oil in a large pan.
6. Place the stains on the pan side by side and in the way to spread together.
7. Ü walk 1–2 tablespoons of delicate sour, then close the cover by adding 2 cups of hot water and leave to pee.
8. After cooking until softened in the fire, take it from the stove and serve by rest.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

aleppo-chicken-and-broccolini-grain-bowl.name: Aleppo-chicken And Broccolini Grain Bowls

ingredients.item: Sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar
. diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep:
boneless chicken thighs (about 6 medium), patted
dry

instructions: Whisk ¼ cup sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar and 1 tsp. honey in a small bowl to combine. Add 1 small red onion, thinly sliced, and stir to coat. Let sit, tossing occasionally, until ready to serve.

Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 400°. Arrange 1 large bunch broccolini on a rimmed baking sheet. Drizzle with extra-virgin olive oil, season with kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper, and toss to coat. Scoot to one side of baking sheet.

Mix together 1 tsp. ground cumin, 1 tsp. smoked paprika, ¼ cup plain whole-milk Greek yogurt, 2 Tbsp. Aleppo-style pepper, 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil, and 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt in a large bowl; season generously with black pepper. Add 1½ lb. skinless, boneless chicken thighs (about 6 medium), patted dry, and turn to coat. Transfer to empty side of baking sheet. Roast until broccolini is tender and chicken is cooked through (an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of thighs should register 165°), 20–30 minutes.
Meanwhile, bring 1 cup water to a boil in a small saucepan. Stir in 1 cup bulgur and a pinch of salt. Remove from heat; cover. Let sit until tender, about 10 minutes. Fluff with a spoon.
Place remaining ½ cup plain whole-milk Greek yogurt in a small bowl, drizzle with oil, and season with salt and black pepper.

Transfer chicken and broccolini to a cutting board; slice
chicken and coarsely chop broccolini. Tip any juices from baking sheet into bulgur, then
drizzle in a little onion pickling liquid and stir to combine. Divide among bowls and
top with broccolini, chicken, and drained pickled onion. Drizzle yogurt mixture over and
sprinkle with more Aleppo-style pepper.

alexander-mccream-spiced-pumpkin-ice-cre.name: Alexander Mccream Spiced Pumpkin Ice Cream

ingredients.item: Plus 1 tablespoon superfine or granulated sugar

instructions: 1. Pour the milk and cream into a large saucepan and heat gently, stirring occasionally, until the mixture begins to steam but not boil.

2. Meanwhile, whisk the egg yolks in a heatproof bowl until smooth. Add 1/3 cup of the sugar and whisk until pale and slightly fluffy. Gradually and slowly, pour the hot milk into the egg mixture while whisking continuously to prevent the eggs from scrambling. Return the mixture to the saucepan and place over low heat, stirring frequently, until the custard thinly coats the back of a wooden spoon. Do not let boil.

3. Pour back into the bowl and set aside for about 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, until cooled to room temperature. For more rapid chilling, fill a sink halfway with cold water and ice and place the bowl of mixture in it for 20 minutes. Never put the hot mixture into the refrigerator.

4. Put the pumpkin, cinnamon, vanilla extract, remaining sugar, and a dash of rum, if using, into a blender or food processor and blend until smooth. Add to the chilled custard and whisk well. Pour the mixture into an ice cream machine and churn according to the manufacturer's instructions.

5. When the churning is completed, use a spoon or spatula to scrape the ice cream into a freezer-proof container with a lid. Freeze until it reaches the correct scooping texture (at least 2 hours). Dust each portion with a little ground cinnamon before serving.

alexander-sauce-recipe-lezzet.name: Alexander Sauce Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 cup grated tomatoes (or 1 cup tomato püresi)
You can use tomato sauce instead of more dense flavor için reindeed tomato.
To make water more fluid için½çcan be added hot water or meat water.
Pain lovers can increase the amount of peppers or add a small amount of isot.
You can add 1 teaspoon of extra butter at the end of cooking of i&ccedil, brighter and classic i̇skender taste.

instructions: 1. melt butter and olive oil together in the pan.
2. Add the tomato salçand add the smell of jealous fireçshort süre roast.
3. Add and mix grated tomatoes.
4. Cook 8–10 minutes in the sosu jealous fire by adding salt, sugar and pepper.
5. Get from the stove area of the sea; serve as hot.
6.  Afiyet olsun.

alexanders-chocolate-covered-peanuts.name: Alexander's Chocolate-covered Peanuts
instructions: Cook almond bark in a slow cooker on High, uncovered and stirring occasionally, until mostly melted, 5 to 10 minutes. Reduce the heat to Low and stir in chocolate chips. Cook and stir until chips are melted and mixture is dark in color, 5 to 10 minutes.

Turn off the heat and stir in peanuts. Drop a spoonful onto a piece of parchment paper to test consistency; it should be thick and chunky. If it's too loose and runny, stir in more chocolate chips and peanuts.
Line several baking sheets with parchment paper. Use a melon baller to drop spoonfuls peanut mixture onto the prepared baking sheets. Let harden before serving, about 1 hour.

alexandras-dessert-argiro.name: Alexandra's Dessert
instructions: I put the flour and sugar and soda in a bowl and mix.
I beat the egg, vanilla, yolk, salt and yogurt together.
Heat the chocolate with butter and oil, water and cocoa, in a pot for 3-4 minutes, stirring in medium heat.
I pour the chocolate mixture into the flour and mix.
Finally I drop the egg mixture.
I butter a small square baking pan and empty the mixture.
Bake at 170.3.3. in the air for 25.

alfajores-with-dulce-de-leche.name: Alfajores With Dulce De Leche

ingredients.item: . (or more) any color plant-based food-coloring powder
. (or more) second color plant-based food-coloring powder

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 375°. Bring condensed milk, coconut milk, and ½ tsp. salt to a boil in a small saucepan over medium-high heat. Scrape mixture into a 13x9" baking dish and bake, stirring every 15 minutes or so, until very thick and a light caramel color, 40–50 minutes. Mixture will look lumpy, broken, and very pasty—that’s exactly what you want. Let cool in dish 1 hour, then transfer to a food processor and process until smooth. Set dulce de leche aside for serving.

Meanwhile, whisk almond flour and 2¼ cups all-purpose flour in a medium bowl to combine. Using an electric mixer on medium-high speed, beat butter, sugar, and 1½ tsp. salt in a large bowl, scraping down sides and bottom of bowl as needed, until pale and creamy, about 3 minutes. Add egg yolk, vanilla, and ¼ cup honey and beat until combined, about 2 minutes. Reduce speed to low, add dry ingredients, and mix, scraping down sides and bottom of bowl, until incorporated. Divide dough in half and pat each piece into a 1"-thick disk. Wrap in plastic and chill until firm, at least 2 hours.

Preheat oven to 350°. Roll out 1 disk of dough on a lightly floured sheet of parchment paper, dusting with more flour as needed to keep dough from sticking, to about ⅛" thick. Punch out shapes with lightly floured cookie cutters and transfer to 2 parchment-lined baking sheets, spacing 1" apart. Pat scraps into a 1"-thick disk, wrap with plastic, and chill 10 minutes if soft.

Bake a sheet of cookies, rotating halfway through, until edges are lightly browned, 7–9 minutes. Let cool 10 minutes on baking sheet, then transfer to a wire rack and let cool completely. Bake remaining sheet of cookies. Line baking sheets with fresh sheets of parchment paper and repeat process with remaining disk of dough.

Divide coconut evenly among 3 bowls. Add 1 Tbsp. food-coloring powder (sift if needed) to a bowl of coconut and toss until coconut is coated; add more powder if a more intense color is desired. Repeat with remaining food-coloring powder and another bowl of coconut. Leave 1 bowl of coconut white. If using, add some luster dust to all 3 bowls and toss to combine.
Turn half of the cookies over to expose flat side; spread 1 tsp. dulce de leche over (this will be the inside of the sandwiches); set aside.

Heat remaining 2 Tbsp. honey in a small bowl in the microwave just until warm (you want it to be loose), then stir in 2 tsp. warm water. Working one at a time, lightly brush honey over the top of remaining cookies (the ones that have not been filled with dulce de leche). Immediately dip tops into a bowl of coconut; press additional coconut onto cookie to cover any bald spots. Close up cookie sandwiches, coconut side up.

Do Ahead: Dulce de leche can be made 1 month ahead; place in an airtight container and freeze. Thaw in refrigerator overnight before using. Dough can be made 3 days ahead; keep chilled. Cookies can be baked (but not assembled) 2 days ahead; store airtight at room temperature.

alfredo-chicken-bake.name: Alfredo Chicken Bake
instructions: Preheat oven to 400˚F (200˚C).
Spread a layer of alfredo sauce on the baking dish. Place chicken breast over sauce. Season chicken with salt and pepper, to taste.
Spread broccoli over chicken.
Pour remaining alfredo over chicken and broccoli.
Top with Parmesan cheese.
Bake for 40 minutes.
Enjoy!

alfredo-chicken-wings.name: Alfredo Chicken Wings
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Grease a large rimmed baking sheet.
Place wings on the prepared baking sheet. Sprinkle with seasoned salt; mix to evenly season wings. Arrange in a single layer.
Bake in the preheated oven until crisp and cooked through, about 1 hour.
Turn on the oven broiler; cook wings under the broiler to crisp both sides, about 1 minute per side. Set aside.
Melt butter over medium-low heat in a small saucepan. Add cream and garlic, stirring until small bubbles form. Add cheese and continue to stir until well blended. Remove the pan from heat.
Toss wings with cream sauce and serve.

alfredo-corn.name: Alfredo Corn

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: finely grated (about 1 cup), plus more for serving

instructions: Melt 2 Tbsp. unsalted butter, cut into pieces, in a medium high-sided skillet over medium heat. Add ½ tsp. freshly ground pepper and cook, swirling pan, until fragrant, about 45 seconds. Add 2 cups fresh corn kernels (from about 2 large ears) and cook, tossing often, until tender, about 2 minutes.

Mix 2 tsp. cornstarch and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt into ½ cup room-temperature water in a small bowl until dissolved. Add to pan; cook, stirring constantly, until liquid thickens and clings to corn, about 2 minutes. Remove pan from heat. Add 2 oz. Parmesan, finely grated (about 1 cup), and stir vigorously until mixture is creamy and melted. Taste creamed corn and season with more salt if needed.
Spoon creamed corn into a shallow bowl. Top with more Parmesan; coarsely crush a handful of store-bought Parmesan cheese crisps over.

alfredo-manicotti.name: Alfredo Manicotti
instructions: Prepare all of the ingredients. Preheat the oven to 204°C.
In a saute pan over medium-high heat, add sausage. Cook and crumble until no longer pink.

In a saucepan over medium-high heat, add butter and garlic powder. Once melted, whisk in flour. Cook for 2 minutes, then whisk in chicken broth. Cook for 2 minutes, then whisk in heavy cream. Add parmesan, whisk and cook until fully melted. Remove from heat.
In a bowl, combine ricotta cheese, Italian sausage, garlic, and 1 cup of mozzarella.

Pour a thin layer of sauce into the bottom of the 13×9 baking dish. Use a teaspoon to push the filling into each pasta tube. Line up in the baking dish. Pour remaining sauce over top of filled pasta tubes. Sprinkle dish with the remaining mozzarella and parsley.
Bake for 30 minutes or until golden brown and bubbling.
Serve warm.

alfredo-pasta-recipe-comedera.name: Alfredo Pasta Recipe

ingredients.item: Two portions of fettoccines (they also call them fettoccini)

instructions: Cooking the dough traditionally. When ready, you put them and put them in a frying pan over medium heat and add butter and parmesan cheese.
Revuelve bien hasta que se mezclen los ingredientes, agrega una pizca de pimienta y listo, ya tienes una pasta Alfredo original.

algarve-orange-pudding-teleculinaria.name: Algarve Orange Pudding
instructions: Pour 150 g of sugar into a pot and wet it with some water. Take it to the fire without moving until you get a caramel. Remove from the fire, water with 50 ml of water and stir well. Caramelize a pudding form and reserve.
Place 1 spoonful of the remaining sugar in a bowl, add the flour, stir and book. Boil the orange juice with the remaining sugar until you get pearl point.

In a bowl, beat the eggs together with the flour preparation. Then add the previous syrup, in yarn and always stirring. Lay in the form and put it in the oven, preheated at 180°C, in a sea bath, for 45 minutes. Remove it from the oven, let it cool down and peel off. Decorate to taste and serve.

algarve-style-fish-cataplana-teleculinar.name: Algarve-style Fish Cataplana
instructions: Tempere o peixe com sal e reserve. Numa cataplana, coloque metade das cebolas, previamente descascadas e cortadas em rodelas, metade dos pimentos, limpos e cortados em tiras, e o azeite.

Adicione o peixe e tempere com o vinho branco e o brandy ou conhaque. Junte os restantes cebola e pimento, cortados da mesma forma. De seguida, acrescente os tomates, limpos de pele e sementes e cortados em rodelas, bem como os dentes de alho picados, piripiri a gosto, as folhas de louro e o ramo de salsa, reservando algumas folhas para o final.
Finally, put over the ham and sausage, cut into cubes, shrimps and clams. Close the cataplana, take it to the fire and let it cook for about 15 minutes.

Peel the potatoes, cut them in half and bake them in a pan apart in salty water. Drain them and add them to the cataplana at the end of the cooking. Serve immediately, decorated with the parsley leaves you have reserved.

algarve-style-hake-teleculinaria.name: Algarve-style Hake
instructions: Tempere os filetes de pescada com sal, disponha-os num tabuleiro e deite por cima os alhos picados e a cebola cortada em rodelas.
Sprinkle with paprika, a hint of pepper and chopped parsley. Water with the lemon juice and abundant olive oil and oven, preheated at 180oC, for about 30 minutes. Serve with tasteful accompaniment.

algarve-style-lambujinhas-teleculinaria.name: Algarve-style Lambujinhas
instructions: Coloque as lambujinhas numa tigela previamente temperada de sal.
Descasque e lave a cebola e os dentes de alho. Pique-os finamente.
In a pot heat the olive oil. Add the onion and garlic teeth. Let it saute.
Add the licks, sweet pepper, lemon juice, chopped coriander, salt and pepper.
Let them cook until they open. Remove from the fire and serve decorated to taste.

algarve-style-tuna-with-sweet-potato-tel.name: Algarve-style Tuna With Sweet Potato
instructions: Season the tuna steaks with lemon juice, crushed garlic, salt and pepper. Reserve.
Peel, cut the onions into slices and praise them in a frying pan, with olive oil and blonde. Add the tomato, cut into small pieces, and let cook.
Disponha os bifes de atum na frigideira, sobre os ingredientes cozinhados, e aloure. Depois, adicione a polpa de tomate e o vinho branco, envolva e deixe cozinhar, em lume brando.
Acrescente as batatas-doces, previamente descascadas e cortadas a gosto, polvilhe com os coentros picados e sirva.

algarvian-style-clams-recipe-teleculinar.name: Algarvian Style Clams Recipe
instructions: Peel and finely pinch the garlic teeth. Also pick the cilantros and book.
Bring to the fire a large pot with the oil and garlic and slightly aloure. Add the well-run clams and a part of the coriander, cover and let cook until the clams open.

Water with white wine and season with salt and pyri to taste. Let it cook in strong heat, stirring from time to time, until the wine evaporates. Sprinkle with the remaining chopped corianders and serve.

algerian-couscous.name: Algerian Couscous

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

ingredients.prep: sliced lengthwise and cut into chunks
sliced lengthwise and cut into chunks

instructions: Heat 3 tablespoons olive oil in a large pot over medium-high heat. Season mutton chops and chicken drumsticks with salt and pepper; cook in batches with onions in the hot oil until browned, about 2 minutes per side. Transfer to a large plate.

Scrape the bottom of the pot with a wooden spoon to release browned bits. Return mutton chops and chicken to the pot. Pour in enough water to cover; add turmeric, cumin, and coriander. Cover and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium; simmer for 20 minutes.

Stir potatoes, turnips, and carrots into the pot. Simmer, covered, until vegetables start to soften, about 10 minutes. Mix in tomato paste and ras el hanout; cook for 10 minutes. Stir in chickpeas, zucchini, and cilantro; continue cooking, covered, until zucchini is tender, about 5 minutes.

Bring 3 cups water to a boil in a saucepan; remove from heat and stir in couscous and butter. Cover saucepan and let stand until water is absorbed completely, 5 to 10 minutes. Fluff couscous with a fork and stir in 1 tablespoon olive oil. Transfer to a serving dish.
Ladle 2 scoops of cooking liquid into a bowl; mix in harissa until smooth.
Scoop vegetables onto a serving plate. Scoop mutton and chicken onto a separate plate. Serve alongside couscous, harissa sauce, and remaining cooking liquid in the pot.

alguashte.name: Alguashte
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (177°C).
Toast pumpkin seeds on a large rimmed baking sheet, tossing halfway through, until golden brown, 20–25 minutes.
Let cool completely.
Transfer cooled pumpkin seeds to a food processor, add salt, and pulse until very finely ground.
Alguashte can be made up to 4 weeks ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

alhada-de-ray-teleculinaria.name: Alhada De Ray
instructions: Cooks the streak in temperate water with salt and vinegar. Drain and reserve some of the cooking water.
Peel the potatoes, cut them into thick slices and bake them in a separate pot, in salt-tempered water.
Peel the garlic and crush it with the water you have reserved to obtain a paste.
Leve ao lume uma frigideira com o azeite e a pasta de alhos e deixe aquecer. Adicione o peixe, envolva e deixe apurar. Sirva com as batatas cozidas, polvilhando tudo com coentros picados.

alhada-dogfish-teleculinaria.name: Alhada Dogfish
instructions: Tempere o peixe com sal e reserve. Descasque e pique os dentes de alho e aloure-os num tacho com o azeite e a folha de louro. Acrescente o peixe e o vinagre, mexa e deixe refogar durante alguns minutos.
Sprinkle later with the moreena flour and chopped corianders, add hot water until you cover the fish, season with salt and spicy and let it shine. Stir and correct the seasonings.
Put slices of bread on a deep platter. Have the cadavers on top, sprinkle with a little more chopped coriander and serve immediately.

alheira-and-dried-fruit-vol-au-vent-tele.name: Alheira And Dried Fruit Vol-au-vent
alheira-and-dried-fruit-vol-au-vent-tele.original_name: Vol-au-vent de alheira e frutos secos
instructions: Pinch the towel with a fork, put it in a baking pan and put it in the oven, preheated at 200°C for 20 minutes. Remove, remove the skin and slightly crush the filling. Mix with the almond and raisin to taste and reserve.
Extend the leafy mass (not finely) on a floured surface and cut it into small circles. With a round cutter, remove the center half of them.

Brush the edge of the complete circles with the egg, previously beaten with water. Above each one, have a circle with orifice and brush again. Take it to the oven at 180 degrees, for about 15 to 20 minutes or until it grows and is golden.

Remove the vol-au-vent from the oven and fill them immediately with the mixture of darkener and dried fruit. Put them on a plate, decorate with the chopped chives and serve them hot or at room temperature.

alheira-and-farinheira-puff-pastries-tel.name: Alheira And Farinheira Puff Pastries
instructions: Preheat the oven at 180°C. Dispose of the skin in the darkener and farinheira and, with the help of a knife, remove the fillings and mix.
Unroll the leafy masses, cut them into squares, and divide by them the filling of baler and farinheira. Fold the tips inward, forming a kind of troux, or wrap it in the form of croissant.
Lay out the foliage on a board, lined with vegetal paper, with the tips facing down, and brush it with the yolk. Take it in the oven for 20 minutes until it's golden.

alheira-balls-with-apple-teleculinaria.name: Alheira Balls With Apple
instructions: Hustle, pinch the onion and saute it in a tack with the butter. Peel the apple, grate it and reserve it.

Remove the skin from the darkener, place the stuffing in a picker or robot, add the onion and crush. Lie down in a bowl, add the grated apple, parsley, lemon juice and the chives and mix it up nicely.

Form balls with the previous mixture, pass them through the bread grated, the egg beaten and again the bread grated. Fry them in hot oil, remove and let it run down on absorbent paper. Serve hot or cold.

alheira-bilharacos-teleculinaria.name: Alheira Bilharacos
instructions: With a knife, cut all the length of the dark circles and remove their skin.
Remove small portions from the filling and molding balls. Pass them through the beaten eggs and then through sesame seeds so that they are fully covered.
Light a frying pan with abundant oil and let it warm. Add the billiards and fry them for about 2 to 3 minutes, turning them from time to time. Drain on absorbent paper and serve.

alheira-bras-with-spinach-teleculinaria.name: Alheira Bras With Spinach
instructions: Remove the skin from the dark circles and cut them into small pieces. Peel and wash the onion and garlic teeth. Lay half the garlic on a pot, add half the olive oil, take it to the fire and let it cook until garlic is golden. Then add the spinach and let it saute, stirring always, until it becomes soft. Remove from the fire and reserve.

Lay the onion and the other garlic on another pot, add the rest of the olive oil, take it to the fire and let it saute, stirring always until golden. Then add the garlic, season with pepper, cook, stir continuously, until it begins to crumble, add the straw potato and wrap.

Then add the beaten eggs and stir until the eggs are cooked. Correct the seasonings, remove from the fire, lay on a platter and serve with spinach in hills and decorated with olives, as you see in the photo.

alheira-de-mirandela-teleculinaria.name: Alheira De Mirandela
instructions: Dispose of the rugs on a tray, pick them up with a fork and put them in the oven, preheated at 180oC, until they are baked. Remove and reserve. Cook the cabbage in salt-tempered water. Drain and reserve too.

Bring to the fire a pot with the cloves of chopped garlic, the oil and the fat of the darkeners, which formed on the board, and let it shine. Add the split cabbage and cowpea, wrap and let cook for 5 minutes.
Remove the codea from the broa and undo the brain. Add to the previous preparation, mix and refine the seasonings of salt and pepper. Remove from the fire and serve with the dark circles.

alheira-in-the-air-fryer-teleculinaria.name: Alheira In The Air Fryer
instructions: Cut the cabbage into pieces and cook it between 7 and 10 minutes in salted water. Drain and reserve. Light a pot with the oil and crushed garlic, add the crumb of the splattered bread and let it shine.
Adicione a couve, tempere com sal e pimenta e deixe cozinhar por cerca de 5 minutos.
Use papel vegetal anti-aderente e forre de modo a que fique com as laterais cobertas com o papel vegetal.
Coloque o preparado anterior, na air fryer, pique as alheiras e disponha por cima
Set at 180°C for 18 minutes. Remove and serve immediately.

alheira-puff-pastries-teleculinaria.name: Alheira Puff Pastries
instructions: Remove the skin from the dark circles and divide each into 3 pieces. Reserve.
After thawed, extend the leafy dough and divide it into 6 rectangles. Brush around with the yolk, previously mixed with milk.
Have a piece of darkener on each rectangle, close, unite the mass, and make some cuts on the surface.
Have the foliage on a tray sprinkled with flour. Brush the surface of each with the remaining yolk and light in the oven, preheated at 220°C, for 25 minutes. Remove from the oven and serve.

alheira-tortilla-teleculinaria.name: Alheira Tortilla

ingredients.item: Sal e pimenta de moinho q.b.

instructions: Peel the potatoes and cut them into thin slices. Fry them slightly in very hot oil so that they are more cooked than fried.
Remove the darkener hair and fry it in a greaseless clay frying pan until golden. Remove from the skillet and let it cool.
Peel and pinch the onion, put it in the same frying pan and add some olive oil. Let it saute until the onion gets soft.
On the other hand, beat the eggs well, seasoning with salt and ground pepper. Lie in the frying pan and add the potatoes and the garlic to pieces.
Take it in the oven, preheated to 160oC, for about 10 minutes. Serve decorated with parsley.

ali-pasha-pilaf-lezzet.name: Ali Pasha Pilaf
instructions: 1. To prepare the meat of meatballs; soak bread and drink it, repel onion.
2. A deep roughing and kneading by adding bread, onion, salt and pepper.
3. Handle and roll the nuts size parts.
4.  Patlıcans are cut off and crack cube.
5. Wait in salty water to remove the pain, dry and dry it.
6. Girl in the liquid pan and fry eggplants after meatballs.
7. Take over paper towel and pull out excess fat.
8.  1 tablespoon of margarine in a small pan and roast the peanuts.
9. Peel tomato and chop cube cube.
10.   Wash and filter the second.
11. Melt the 2 tablespoon of margarine in the pot and roast the rice.
12. Add and mix tomato.
12. August Add and blend meatballs, eggplants and nuts.
14 July Add broth and salt and close the cover.
15. Bake fire for 20 minutes.
16. Take it out of fire and leave it to be brewed with paper towel.
17. September Decorate and serve with a fine chopped deck.
18. Rices can still add hot water up to 1 coffee cup while rice is still on.

alias-osso-buco.name: Alia's Osso Buco

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Mix flour and parsley in a bowl; season with salt and pepper. Dip veal shanks into flour mixture, shaking off excess flour.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Fry veal in hot oil until browned, about 10 minutes; transfer to a large baking dish. Return skillet to stove.

Cook and stir onion, carrots, and celery in the skillet used to fry veal until vegetables begin to brown, about 5 minutes. Transfer vegetables to the baking dish and pour wine into the skillet. Bring to a boil, scraping up any browned bits from the skillet. Reduce heat to medium-low and continue to simmer until wine is reduced by half, about 5 minutes.
Stir tomatoes, thyme, and bay leaves into wine. Simmer until tomatoes are hot, about 10 minutes. Pour tomato mixture over veal and vegetables. Stir to combine. Cover baking dish with aluminum foil.
Bake in the preheated oven until veal is very tender, about 90 minutes.

aliada-argiro.name: Aliada
instructions: For the apiada we keep small pieces of the gliding cod to give flavor.
Place the fish pieces in a pot and add plenty of water.
Allow to boil, lower the heat and simmer for 20 minutes for the fish to remove all its flavor.
We drain the broth and keep it sideways.
Clean the potatoes, cut them into pieces and boil them in a pot until softened for about 20 minutes.
Drain them very well and mash them with the potato press.
Melt garlic cloves with olive oil in the blender and add them to the pulped potatoes.
Mix with the spoon to homogenize.
Add lemon juice to make the fish as acidic as we wish.
Finally, stirring, add the fish broth a little bit until the fish is homogenized.
We gradually pour the broth so it doesn't become too fluid.
In the end we check if salt is needed because the broth is usually salty.

alicante-nougat-recipe-comedera.name: Alicante Nougat Recipe
instructions: You have the almonds in a frying pan till they are slightly golden. Reserve.
Vierte la miel en una olla y lleva al fuego.
Cooking at medium heat - low till honey gets fraked and more liquid.
Incorporate sugar and mix very well until dissolved.
Cocina a fuego bajo hasta que se forme una mezcla ligera, similar a la un caramelo.
Apaga y deja reposar 1 minuto.
Bat the egg clear to snow and add to the earlier mixture.
Mix well till everything's perfectly integrated.
Agrega las almendras y mezcla.
Forra un molde rectangular con papel antiadherente y coloca una oblea.
Fold the turret and cover with the second oblet.
Let rest for at least 6 hours.
Pasado este tiempo, debe estar compacto. Desmolda con cuidado y corta en porciones.

alices-turkey-day-light-rolls.name: Alice's Turkey Day Light Rolls
instructions: Stir milk, 4 1/2 tablespoons shortening, sugar, and salt together in a bowl. Cool until mixture is lukewarm.
Pour water into a bowl and sprinkle yeast over the top. Let stand until yeast softens and begins to form a creamy foam, about 5 minutes; stir. Stir milk mixture into yeast mixture until smooth.
Beat 2 1/4 cups flour into yeast mixture until smooth. Gradually stir in remaining flour until dough comes together.

Turn dough out onto a lightly floured work surface and knead until dough is smooth and elastic, about 8 minutes. Place dough in an oiled bowl, brush with melted shortening, cover the bowl with a clean towel, and set in a warm place to rise until doubled in volume, about 2 hours.
Punch dough down and form into 24 rolls. Place rolls on a lightly greased baking dish, cover with a towel, and let rise until doubled in volume, about 40 minutes.
Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, 12 to 15 minutes.

alicha-denich.name: Alicha Denich

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: peeled, sliced on a diagonal  0.25" thick
peeled, halved, each half cut crosswise into 3 pieces

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 tbsp. plus  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
Ground turmeric or 1 tbsp. finely grated peeled turmeric

instructions:
Purée jalapeños, chile de árbol, garlic, ginger, cilantro, oil, and salt in a small blender or food processor until smooth. Transfer awaze to a small glass jar or airtight container, seal tightly or cover, and chill until ready to use.
Do ahead: Awaze can be made 1 week ahead. Keep chilled.

Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high. Cook onions, stirring often, until softened and golden, 12–14 minutes. Add carrots and cook, stirring, 1 minute, then add 1 cup water and cook, stirring, until carrots are tender, 7–9 minutes. Add potatoes, cabbage, green and red jalapeños, garlic, salt, turmeric, ¼ cup awaze, and 2 Tbsp. water and mix well to combine. Bring to a simmer, cover, and reduce heat to low. Cook, stirring occasionally, until potatoes are partly tender, 12–15 minutes. Remove from heat and let sit, covered, until potatoes are completely tender, 8–10 minutes. Uncover stew and give it a good stir. Stew can be served hot, warm, or room temperature.
Do ahead: Stew can be made 1 day ahead. Let cool; cover and chill. (The flavor will get even better.)

alinazik-recipe-lezzet.name: Alinazik Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 ça tablespoon of pepper or powder red pepper

instructions: 1. Közle the eggplants, peel off the shells, or crush fine.
2. Sümix yogurt with garlic and salt, add eggplants and make pürüzsüz.
3. Heat the butter and olive oil in the pan, add meats and shake the water and roast until the water.
4. Cook until softening meat by adding salt, pepper and pepper.
5. Post eggplant mixture into the service plate, & place meats on the car.
6. melt the butter and rub it with red pepper and serve the food & wine.
7.  Afiyet olsun.

alitas-tomato-beef-stew.name: Alita's Tomato Beef Stew
instructions: Combine flour, salt, and pepper in a resealable bag; add stew meat and shake until meat is coated.
Heat oil in a Dutch oven or large heavy-bottomed pot over medium heat. Add coated meat and loose flour from the bag to the hot oil; cook and stir until browned on all sides, 5 to 10 minutes.

Mix tomatoes, onions, tomato sauce, water, Worcestershire sauce, garlic, paprika, sugar, and bay leaves into stew meat mixture; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer stew, scraping bottom of Dutch oven every 30 minutes, about 1 hour.
Stir carrots into stew and cook for 30 minutes more. Add potatoes to stew and cook until potatoes are tender, about 30 minutes. Add mushrooms to stew and cook until tender, about 15 minutes.

alive-and-kicking.name: Alive And Kicking

ingredients.item: . compass box whisky co. orangerie or grand marnier

instructions: Combine sugar and 1 Tbsp. hot water in a jar, cover, and shake until sugar is dissolved. Chill until cold.

For each cocktail, combine 1 oz. coffee, 1 oz. fernet, ¾ oz. amaro, ¾ oz. Scotch, and ¼ oz. demerara simple syrup in a cocktail shaker. Fill shaker with ice and shake vigorously until outside of shaker is frosty, about 30 seconds. Strain into a coupe glass. Garnish with an orange twist.

all-as-spring-salad-with-mahi-mahi.name: All A’s Spring Salad With Mahi-mahi
instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Place mahi-mahi on a rimmed baking sheet and rub all over with 1 Tbsp. oil; season on both sides with salt and pepper. Brush or rub fish on both sides with 1 Tbsp. plus 1 tsp. mustard. Using a Microplane, finely grate zest of lemon over fish. Set lemon aside.
Bake mahi-mahi until opaque throughout and flesh flakes easily with a fork, 8–10 minutes.
Meanwhile, heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet, preferably cast iron, over high. Cook asparagus, turning occasionally, until blistered in spots, about 4 minutes total; season with salt.

Remove mahi-mahi from oven. Cut reserved lemon in half and squeeze juice from 1 half over fish. Squeeze juice from remaining half into a medium bowl (catching any seeds with your other hand). Add honey, remaining 1 tsp. mustard, and remaining ¼ cup oil and whisk until smooth; season dressing with salt and pepper.
Add avocado and arugula to dressing and toss gently to coat. Taste salad and season with more salt and pepper.
Divide fish and asparagus among plates and scatter salad on top.

all-saints-cupcakes-teleculinaria.name: All Saints Cupcakes
instructions: Undo the yeast with the water in a bowl and stir well. Then add the other ingredients and knead until they are well connected. Finally, add the coarsely minced dried fruits and wrap. Place the dough on a tray sprinkled with flour and let the dough leave until it is twice as large.
Divida a massa em bolinhas e coloque em tabuleiros polvilhados com farinha e deixe levedar durante mais 30 minutos.
After this time brush with yolk and bring to the oven preheated at 180oC for 25 minutes, until the cookies are cooked. Remove and serve decorated to taste.

all-she-wrote-punt-e-mes-and-vermouth-co.name: All She Wrote Punt E Mes And Vermouth Cocktail
instructions: To serve, turn bottle gently end over end to mix. Place a large ice cube in each rocks glass, then pour in cocktail. Give each drink one gentle stir before serving. Garnish with a small pinch of salt.

all-strawberry-cake-argiro.name: All Strawberry Cake
instructions: For strawberry cake, heat the oven to 170oC in the air.
Butter and spread parchment paper in 3 baking pans with a diameter of 23 cm.
In the mixer beat the sugar, tight strawberry jam and butter to fluffy.
One at a time add the eggs by beating the mixture to drink them each time.
Add the vanilla.
Add the flour, baking powder, salt and milk to the bowl.
The mixer must be at low speed.
Finally, we add strawberry mashed potatoes.
Gently mix and equalize in the baking pans.
Bake for 25′ to 30′′ until they inflate, unstuck from the sides of the baking pan and the knife comes out clean from the center.
Leave for 15 minutes on the baking pans and then dissipate to cool well.

all-american-barbecue-sauce.name: All-american Barbecue Sauce
instructions: Bring all ingredients to a boil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Reduce heat to low and simmer, stirring often, until sauce is thickened and begins to turn dark red, about 20 minutes. Let cool. DO AHEAD: Can be made 2 weeks ahead. Cover and chill.

all-american-cheeseburger-pasta.name: All-american Cheeseburger Pasta

ingredients.prep: finely grated (about  0.75 cup), plus more for serving

instructions: Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high until hot. Divide beef into 4 large loosely packed balls and place in Dutch oven. With a sturdy spatula, aggressively flatten balls as though you were making smash burgers; season with salt. Cook, undisturbed, until patties are well browned and crisp on the bottom, about 4 minutes. Turn each patty, season with salt, and continue to cook until second side is well browned, about 3 minutes longer. Transfer patties to a plate and let cool slightly.
Reduce heat to medium. Cook onion in pot, stirring often, until golden and browned around the edges, 10–15 minutes. (Some light scorching and sticking is okay here; don’t be shy.)
While onions are cooking, transfer patties to a cutting board and coarsely chop.

Add garlic to pot and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Using a wooden spoon or spatula, push onion-garlic mixture to one side of pot to make space, tilting pot if necessary to get some hot fat over to the empty side. Add tomato paste to empty space and stir in hot fat until fragrant and begins to darken, about 2 minutes. Add tomatoes, banana peppers, soy sauce, red pepper flakes, and chopped meat and stir everything in pot together. Cook, stirring occasionally, until sauce is simmering and flavors have melded, about 10 minutes. Reduce heat to low and keep warm until ready to use.

Meanwhile, cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until 1 minute shy of al dente (pasta will finish cooking in the sauce). Increase heat under sauce to medium. Using a spider or large slotted spoon, transfer pasta to Dutch oven along with 2 cups pasta cooking liquid. Stirring constantly, add cheddar and 3 oz. Parmesan a handful at a time, allowing cheese to melt and emulsify into sauce between additions, about 3 minutes.
Transfer pasta to a platter. Top with more Parmesan.

all-american-flag-cake.name: All-american Flag Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease and flour a 9x13-inch baking pan.

Combine cake mix, 1 cup water, eggs, and vegetable oil in a large bowl; beat with an electric mixer on low speed until moistened. Increase speed to medium and beat for 2 minutes. Pour batter into the prepared baking pan.

Bake in the preheated oven until lightly browned and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 23 to 28 minutes. Cool completely on a wire rack. Poke holes about 1 inch apart all over cake with a fork.

Dissolve strawberry gelatin in ½ cup boiling water in a bowl; slowly pour over cake, letting gelatin seep into holes. Refrigerate cake until gelatin sets, about 1 hour. Transfer cake to a serving platter; cut in half horizontally.

Whisk instant pudding mix into milk in a bowl until thickened, about 2 minutes; stir in ½ cup blueberries. Spread blueberry-pudding filling onto bottom cake layer; place top cake layer over filling. Spread whipped topping over top and sides of cake; arrange remaining ½ cup blueberries in a square in upper left corner of cake for stars. Arrange alternating layers of strawberries and miniature marshmallows into horizontal red and white stripes.

all-american-loaded-baked-potato-salad.name: All-american Loaded Baked Potato Salad
instructions: Place potatoes in a pot and cover with cold water. Add salt and bring to a boil. Simmer until potatoes are just tender enough to be pierced with a fork, about 15 minutes. Drain and run under cold water until potatoes are slightly cool.

Mix sour cream, creamy salad dressing, and ground black pepper together in a large bowl. Stir in Cheddar cheese, green onion, and bacon bits; add potatoes. Cover and chill in the refrigerator until ready to serve.

all-american-trifle.name: All-american Trifle
instructions: Sprinkle strawberries with sugar in a bowl; stir to distribute sugar, and set aside.
Chill a large metal mixing bowl and beaters from an electric mixer.
Pour cream into the chilled mixing bowl, and add lemon yogurt, pudding mix, and about 1 tablespoon of coconut rum; beat until fluffy with an electric mixer set on medium speed.

Spread a layer of pound cake cubes into the bottom of a glass trifle dish, and sprinkle cubes with remaining tablespoon coconut rum. Cover pound cake with a layer of strawberries; sprinkle blueberries over strawberries. Spread a thick layer of whipped cream over the berries.

Repeat the layers several times, ending with a layer of strawberries sprinkled with blueberries and reserving about 1 cup of whipped cream; top the trifle with dollops of whipped cream to serve. Refrigerate leftovers.

all-butter-pie-dough.name: All-butter Pie Dough
instructions: Pulse flour and salt in a food processor to combine. Pulse in butter until mixture resembles coarse meal with pieces of butter still visible, about 20 pulses.
Combine vinegar and ½ cup ice water in a measuring cup. Pulsing, drizzle in vinegar mixture; pulse until dough just holds together when squeezed (it should still be crumbly), about 10 pulses.
Turn out dough and divide in half. Place each half on a sheet of plastic wrap and use plastic to press into disks. Wrap and chill until firm, about 2 hours.
DO AHEAD: Dough can be chilled 3 days ahead. Or, freeze up to 2 months.

all-day-apple-butter.name: All-day Apple Butter
instructions: Place apples in a slow cooker. Combine sugar, cinnamon, cloves, and salt together in a medium bowl; pour over apples and mix well.
Cover and cook on High for 1 hour.
Reduce heat to Low and cook, stirring occasionally, until mixture is thick and dark brown, 9 to 11 hours.
Uncover and continue cooking on Low for 1 hour. Whisk to make smooth, if desired.
Spoon mixture into sterile containers, cover; refrigerate or freeze.

all-dressed-up-cauliflower-rice.name: All-dressed-up Cauliflower Rice

ingredients.item: Plain whole-milk greek yogurt and lime wedges

instructions: Working in 2 batches, pulse cauliflower in a food processor until pieces are about the size of rice (you don’t want to overprocess; err on the large side). Transfer cauliflower to a medium bowl lined with a kitchen towel to absorb any extra moisture.

Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Add bell pepper, shallot, and garlic and cook, stirring occasionally, until shallot and garlic are softened slightly, about 3 minutes. Sprinkle in curry powder, turmeric, and coriander and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Add coconut milk, lime zest, lime juice, and coconut sugar; season with salt. Reduce heat to medium-low; cook, stirring, until slightly thickened, about 2 minutes. Add cauliflower and raisins; cook, tossing occasionally, until cauliflower is just tender, about 3 minutes. Taste and season with more salt if needed.

Add cilantro, pumpkin seeds, and ¼ cup mint to cauliflower rice and toss to combine. Divide among bowls; top with a dollop of yogurt if using and torn mint. Serve with lime wedges for squeezing over if desired.

all-fruit-smoothies.name: All-fruit Smoothies
instructions: Pour pineapple juice into a blender and add banana, strawberries, and blueberries. Cover and blend until smooth, about 1 minute. Pour into 2 glasses.

all-purpose-ancho-spice-rub.name: All-purpose Ancho Spice Rub
instructions: Whisk ancho chile powder, paprika, mustard powder, coriander, oregano, cumin, salt, pepper, and chile de árbol in an airtight container; cover.
DO AHEAD: Rub can be made 1 month ahead. Store at room temperature in a dark place.

all-purpose-coconut-curry.name: All-purpose Coconut Curry

ingredients.item: . (or more) grapeseed oil or vegetable oil

instructions: Pulse ginger and garlic in a food processor, adding a few drops of oil if needed to help blend smoothly, until a coarse paste forms. (Alternatively, you can finely grate ginger and garlic with a Microplane.)

Heat oil in a medium Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Add a few mustard seeds to the pot. When seeds start to wiggle and pop, reduce heat to medium and add curry leaves (if using), asafetida (if using), and remaining mustard seeds. Cover pot and cook spices, swirling, until mustard seeds start popping more gradually, about 30 seconds. Uncover pot and return heat to medium-high. Add ginger-and-garlic paste and cook, stirring constantly, until beginning to brown, about 1 minute. Add red onions and a big pinch of salt and cook, stirring often and reducing heat if needed to prevent burning, until onions are golden brown and jammy, 10–12 minutes.

Stir in turmeric, then tomatoes and bring to a simmer. Reduce heat to medium and cook, stirring often, until tomatoes are glossy and darkened in color and oil starts to separate around edges of pot, 7–9 minutes.

Add coconut milk and broth and stir to combine; season with salt. Bring curry to a simmer, then reduce heat to medium-low. Cover and cook another 10 minutes, stirring every couple of minutes to prevent sticking and burning. Taste curry and season with more salt if needed.
Do Ahead: Curry can be made 5 days ahead. Let cool, then transfer to an airtight container and chill, or freeze up to 3 months. If frozen, thaw in the refrigerator before using.

all-purpose-fry-batter.name: All-purpose Fry Batter

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Vigorously whisk 1 cup (125 g) all-purpose flour, ¾ cup (107 g) rice flour, ½ tsp. baking powder, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a large bowl to combine. Pour in one 12-oz. can seltzer, whisking constantly to ensure a lump-free batter.

Pour vegetable oil (for frying; about 11 cups) into a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot to come 2" up sides. Heat over medium-high until a thermometer, preferably a digital instant-read, inserted into the oil registers 350°. Working in batches, dip 1 lb. food of choice into batter, gently shaking off excess. Slide into oil and cook, stirring and turning occasionally to prevent sticking, until golden brown, 4–8 minutes, depending on the size of your food.

Using a spider or slotted spoon, transfer food to a large plate or rimmed baking sheet lined with paper towels and let drain. Sprinkle lightly with salt while still hot.
Do ahead: Dry ingredients for batter can be combined 3 months ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

all-purpose-no-salt-seasoning-mix.name: All-purpose No-salt Seasoning Mix
instructions: Mix together garlic powder, basil, parsley, savory, thyme, mace, onion powder, black pepper, sage, and cayenne pepper in a bowl.
Store in a sealed jar.

all-purpose-pie-dough.name: All-purpose Pie Dough
instructions: Stir sugar, vinegar, and 2 Tbsp. hot water in a small measuring glass to dissolve sugar. Add ⅓ cup ice water and stir to melt ice; chill in freezer until very cold, about 10 minutes (do not let it freeze).

Pulse flour, butter, and salt in a food processor until largest pieces of butter are pea-size. Turn out onto a work surface and, using the heel of your hand, smash butter into flour to flatten. Working quickly, continue smashing butter into flour until mixture is pale yellow and resembles coarse meal. Gather into a mound and make a well in the center. Pour in sugar mixture, using your fingertips to slowly incorporate into flour; work in until only a few dry spots remain. Knead until no dry spots remain and dough holds together when pressed.
Divide dough in half, flatten into disks, and wrap each in plastic. Chill until firm, at least 2 hours.
Do Ahead: Dough can be made 3 days ahead. Keep chilled, or freeze up to 1 month.

all-purpose-pizza-dough.name: All-purpose Pizza Dough

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 tbsp. plus 2 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Whisk 2 tsp. honey, ½ tsp. active dry yeast, and 2½ cups water in the bowl of a stand mixer until honey and yeast are dissolved.

Fit bowl onto mixer fitted with the dough hook attachment. Add ⅔ cup (83 g) whole wheat flour and 3 cups (375 g) Italian 00 flour or bread flour and mix on medium-low speed, scraping down sides of bowl as needed, until mixture resembles pancake batter, about 4 minutes. Add 3 Tbsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 Tbsp. plus 2¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt and remaining 3 cups (375 g) Italian 00 flour or bread flour; mix until dough forms a ball, about 2 minutes. Increase speed to high and continue to mix until dough is smooth and sticky and pulls away from sides of bowl, 8–10 minutes more.
Remove bowl from mixer and cover with plastic wrap. Let sit at room temperature 5 hours, then chill at least 12 hours and up to 2 days.
Divide dough into 4 portions and form into balls; place on a lightly oiled baking sheet. Cover with an upturned baking sheet and let sit at room temperature 4 hours.

all-purpose-vinaigrette.name: All-purpose Vinaigrette

ingredients.item: Sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar

instructions: Whisk oil, vinegar, shallot, and thyme in a small bowl. Season with salt and pepper.
Do Ahead: Dressing can be made 4 days ahead. Cover and chill.

allies-espresso-kahlua-liqueur.name: Allie's Espresso Kahlua® Liqueur
instructions: Stir brown sugar into espresso in a bowl or container with a spout until dissolved; stir in rum.
Pour mixture into a clean, dark bottle; add vanilla bean.
Seal bottle tightly with a lid and let sit for 1 month before drinking.

allium-confit.name: Allium Confit

ingredients.prep: white and pale green parts only, coarsely chopped

ingredients.item: Coarsely chopped green garlic or whole garlic cloves

instructions: Bring chives, leek, green garlic, and oil to a simmer in a large saucepan over medium heat (this will take some time—be patient!) and cook 2 minutes. Let cool (alliums will soften and finish cooking as they sit).
Transfer to an airtight container; cover and chill.

almeirim-cod-stew-teleculinaria.name: Almeirim Cod Stew
instructions: Cut the cod posts in half; cut the sausages into pieces or slices; peel and cut the potatoes into slices; peel the onion and garlic teeth, cut the onion into slices and pinch the garlic teeth; cut the tomatoes into slices; wash the cabbage and cut it into small pieces.

Light a pot with the olive oil and let it warm. Add the onion, garlic teeth, sweet pepper, salt and pepper and let it saute. Then add the tomatoes, sausages, potatoes, water and white wine and let cook for 15 minutes.
Then correct the seasonings, add the kale, cod and pasta, water with more boiling water, if necessary, and let cook, in mild heat, for another 15 minutes. Serve hot.

almejas-con-alguashte.name: Almejas Con Alguashte
instructions: Toast coriander seeds in a dry small skillet over medium heat until very fragrant and just beginning to smoke, about 1 minute. Let cool slightly.
Transfer seeds to a food processor and pulse until coarsely ground. Add tomatoes, onion, garlic, jalapeños, cilantro stems, and achiote seeds and pulse until a coarse purée forms, about 1 minute.

Heat oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Add purée and ½ cup Alguashte. Cook, stirring often with a wooden spoon, until thickened (spoon will leave a trail) and a few shades darker, 12–15 minutes. Add wine and cook until evaporated and spoon again leaves a trail when dragged through, about 3 minutes.
Add clams to pot and stir to coat. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover pot, and cook until clams have opened, 8–12 minutes. Fish out and discard any clams that have not opened after 15 minutes.
Squeeze limes over clams and toss to incorporate. If broth looks too thick, add a few tablespoonfuls of water. Taste and season with salt if needed.
To serve, sprinkle remaining 2 Tbsp. Alguashte over clams and top with cilantro leaves.

almond-you-must-be-nuts-crackers.name: Almond 'you Must Be Nuts!' Crackers
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Mix almond flour, walnuts, flax seed meal, and salt together in a bowl until well combined. Add water and olive oil; mix until dough is moist and holds together.

Turn dough onto the prepared baking sheet. Place a second piece of parchment over the dough and use a rolling pin to roll it into a 1/16-inch-thick rectangle. Remove the top piece of parchment and cut the sides of dough to make an even rectangle. Add excess dough to corners or one end of the rectangle and re-roll to a uniform thickness.
Cut dough into 1-inch squares using a pizza cutter, keeping dough still attached.
Bake in the preheated oven until the outside edges of dough are browned, about 15 minutes. Cool crackers on the baking sheet, then break into squares.

almond-aioli.name: Almond Aioli
instructions: Purée almonds, oil, salt, and ½ cup water in a high-powered blender on high speed until thick, light, and smooth, about 3 minutes.
Aioli can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill. Thin with water if needed.

almond-and-grain-sorrels-teleculinaria.name: Almond And Grain Sorrels
instructions: Make the dough: Lay the flour in a bowl, add the margarine and lard and mix very well until it becomes a kind of moist sand. In a separate bowl, beat the egg with the water, add it to the preparation and knead, without working hard, until a homogeneous mass is left.

The filling: take a pot to the fire with the water, the Yellow Sugar RAR, the lemon peel and the cinnamon stick, stir and let it boil for about 10 minutes. Drain and pass the grain cooked through the pass, add to the pot, also add the granulated almond and stir until it begins to boil. In a bowl, beat the yolks, add some of the mix of the pot always stirring, add to the pot and let cook, stirring continuously until it begins to thicken. Take it out of the fire and let it cool.

Extend the dough on a flour-sprinkled countertop, have some of the stuffing, brush around with some water, fold and cut in a rissol shape. Repeat the operation until the stuffing and the dough are finished and then the sours fry until they are golden on both sides. Let it drip on a sheet of kitchen paper, then go through powdered sugar and serve decorated to taste.

almond-and-lemon-cookies-with-chocolate-.name: Almond And Lemon Cookies With Chocolate
almond-and-lemon-cookies-with-chocolate-.original_name: Galletas de almendra y limón con chocolate

instructions: Combine chopped almonds and parsley on a cutting board; chop together again until very finely chopped.
Transfer almond mixture to a bowl and add garlic. Stir olive oil into almond mixture until a thick sauce forms.

almond-and-raisin-agrodolce.name: Almond And Raisin Agrodolce

ingredients.prep: very thinly sliced, rinsed, patted dry

instructions: Place raisins in a medium bowl and pour vinegar over (it should cover raisins). Let sit, stirring occasionally, 10 minutes for raisins to soften.
Meanwhile, combine oil and almonds in a small skillet and set over medium heat. Cook, stirring occasionally, until flesh is golden brown, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a small bowl and let cool.
Mix raisins, onion, lemon zest, and red pepper flakes into almonds; season with salt. Let sit 10 minutes.
Toss in parsley just before serving.

almond-and-raspberry-swirl-ice-cream.name: Almond And Raspberry Swirl Ice Cream
instructions: Bring raspberries, sugar, and ¼ tsp. salt to a simmer in a medium saucepan over medium heat and cook, stirring often, until raspberries begin to burst and lose their shape, about 4 minutes. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a large measuring glass, pressing on solids; discard solids. Pour back into saucepan and return to medium heat. Cook, stirring occasionally, until sauce is thick enough to coat a spoon, 10–15 minutes. (You should have about 6 Tbsp.) Transfer back to measuring glass and chill until cold, about 30 minutes.
Mix condensed milk, almond extract, and remaining ¾ tsp. salt in a medium bowl to combine.
Using an electric mixer, beat cream in a medium bowl, starting on low speed and gradually increasing to medium-high as it thickens, until billowy and stiff peaks form, about 4 minutes.

Add a dollop of whipped cream to condensed milk mixture and mix in with a rubber spatula (this is just to lighten it so that the next stage—folding—is easier). Add remaining whipped cream; fold in, running spatula down sides and along bottom of bowl, then lifting up through center and over top while rotating bowl to integrate without deflating, until very few streaks of condensed milk mixture remain.

Scrape about one third of ice cream base into a loaf pan that’s at least 8½x4½". Drizzle over one third of raspberry syrup. Repeat layers 2 more times, ending with raspberry syrup (no need to be precise). Using a small offset spatula or butter knife, make figure-eight motions through ice cream base to swirl raspberry syrup throughout. Cover with plastic wrap or an airtight silicone lid and freeze until solid, at least 8 hours.
To serve, transfer loaf pan to refrigerator and let ice cream soften 10 minutes before scooping into bowls.
Do ahead: Ice cream can be made 1 week ahead. Keep frozen.

almond-and-turkish-coffee-cookies-lezzet.name: Almond And Turkish Coffee Cookies
instructions: 1. Mix milk, vanilla, Turkish coffee and powder sugar in a large bowl.

almond-biscotti.name: Almond Biscotti
instructions: Stir 1 cup (200 g) sugar, ½ cup (1 stick) unsalted butter, melted, 3 Tbsp. brandy, 2 tsp. pure almond extract, and 1 tsp. pure vanilla extract with a wooden spoon in a large bowl to combine. Add 1 cup whole almonds with skin, lightly toasted, cooled, and coarsely chopped, and 3 large eggs, lightly beaten, and stir vigorously to combine. Sift in 2¾ (344 g) cups all-purpose flour, 1½ tsp. baking powder, and ¼ tsp. kosher salt and stir until just combined and no floury streaks remain. Chill dough, covered, 30 minutes.
Place rack in center of oven; preheat oven to 177°C.

Using moistened hands, divide chilled dough in half and form 2 (16x2") loaves on an ungreased large baking sheet. Bake until pale golden, about 30 minutes. Carefully transfer loaves to a rack and cool 15 minutes.

Cut loaves into ¾" slices with a serrated knife. Arrange biscotti, with a cut side down, on a clean baking sheet and bake until golden, 20–25 minutes. Transfer to wire rack to cool completely.
Do ahead: Biscotti improve in flavor if made 1–2 days ahead. Keep in an airtight container at room temperature.

Editor's note: This recipe was first printed in the January 2009 issue of ‘Gourmet’ as Nonna’s Biscotti.

almond-bread-lezzet.name: Almond Bread
instructions: 1. Mix the almond flour, cheese, baking powder and salt by taking a rough.
2. Take a amount of cheese to use later.

7. Remove from the oven and wait to cool.
