After this time, we'll place the slice of bread into the pot, and let them cough for 5 minutes. We have to turn them around so they can have color from both sides. Another option is toast them in a toaster and then bring them to the pot.

We'll cut bread into crumbs with the help of a kitchen spatula and put it back onto the edge of the pot. Then we will also add the other vegetables (with the exception of parsley), we will pat the set and we will revamp for 5 minutes. They have to be turned around so they can have color from all sides.

We will soon water with brandy and with care, we will light with a lighter to awaken our preparations. If you do not feel comfortable with the idea of flabeado, you can simply let the set cook for a few minutes, so that alcohol will be reduced.
Luego vamos a agregar el tomate frito y a mezclar todo.
Now we'll be bathing with the fish stock. We'll cover the pot and let the soup cook for 20 minutes.
Mientras se cocina nuestro caldo, aprovecharemos para preparar los pescados y mariscos. El pescado ya debe estar limpio y listo para utilizarse. Entonces, vamos a trocearlo.

The locusts have to be peeled (and the wisest thing to have used their shells to prepare the fumet). The next thing we'll do, we'll heat up a frying pan with some oil. Once the preparations have been crushed, we will put them back into the pot (if we have put them out). We'll add the locusts and fish to the soup, and we'll let everything cook for another 5 minutes.
We will use the time of this last cooking to try the soup, and if necessary, correct the season with a touch of salt and / or pepper.
Finally, we'll put out our soup and be ready to serve hot.

and-tomato-avocado-melt.name: And Tomato Avocado Melt
instructions: Slice avocado.
Slice tomato.
Split english muffin and place the halves face up on a baking sheet.
Cover with avocado, tomato, and top with two slices of Mozzarella cheese. Season with cayenne pepper, to taste.
Broil until cheese is melted and starts to brown. Season each melt with salt and pepper to taste.
Enjoy!

and-tomato-soup-recipe-comedera.name: And Tomato Soup Recipe
and-tomato-soup-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de sopa de tomate fácil y rápida
instructions: Fill a pot with water and put the tomatoes to boil for 1 minute, get them out and put them in cold water. That's how you can get their skin out easy.
Once without skin, pits tomatoes into small cubes and reserve.
Peel the onion, pepper and garlic very small and sock them in a frying pan with olive oil. Cook them till onion and garlic are golden, but care that they will not be burned.
Add the chopped tomatoes, the bay leaf and a pint of salt and pepper. Add 2 glasses of water or, if you prefer, you can use vegetable stock.
Put the fire down in half and let it boil for 30 minutes. Check every once in a while and check his salt.
After this time you can do 2 things: leave tomato soup as it stands, with pieces of vegetables, or liquefied. If you choose to liquefied it, get his bay leaf first.
Once liquefied, you'll have your delicious and easy tomato soup ready.

and-tuna-marmitako-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de marmitako de atún casero y fácil

Luego pones los pimientos (el choricero y el verde troceado), el tomate y una pizca de sal, le das 3 vueltas y agregas suficiente agua para que cubra las patatas por completo.
Let them cook about 15 minutes or till the potato's ready. Add more salt to this stock if necessary.
After this time incorporates pieces of tuna and peas. Put the fire down and let them cook for ten more minutes.
Transcurrido el tiempo retira del fuego, deja reposar unos 3 minutos y sirve en un plato hondo con un buen chorro de aceite de oliva virgen extra.

and-vegan-pumpkin-cake-comedera.name: And Vegan Pumpkin Cake

Triple pumpkin till you get a fine and steamed purée. If it's very aqueous, scrape it slightly with a paddle to prevent the biscuit from getting heavy.
In a large bowl, mix pumpkin purée with oil, sugar and vanilla until the whole is homogenous.
Add vinegar or lemon juice and mix briefly. It doesn't have a taste but helps to activate bicarbonate during baking.
It incorporates chewed flour, bicarbonate, salt and cinnamon. Mixture with spatula, without beating, only to integrate. The mass should be thick but smooth.
Add the chocolate and mix sparks with softness and distribute them without more work.
Vierte la mezcla en el molde, alisa la superficie y golpea ligeramente el molde contra la encimera para eliminar burbujas grandes.
Hornea durante unos 45 minutos, o hasta que al pinchar con un palillo salga limpio o con migas secas. Deja reposar 10 minutos antes de desmoldar y pasar a una rejilla.

and-vegetable-soup.name: And Vegetable Soup
instructions: Combine tomatoes, chicken broth, tomato juice, carrots, celery, potato, green beans, corn, and water in a large stockpot. Season with salt, pepper, and Creole seasoning.
Bring to a boil over medium heat and simmer until vegetables are tender, about 30 minutes.
Serve hot and enjoy!

Once the water's already boiling, we'll add a touch of salt to our taste and an oil pint. Don't add the salt before the water's boiling, or this stage will take quite a while.
Then go and put the lasagna leaves into the water. Enter them one at a time so they don't stick, and let them cook for 10 minutes.

We will use this time to prepare a frying as a basis for this recipe, to give much more flavour to the plate. To this end, we will peel the onion and mingle it into small pieces. We'll also peel his garlic tooth and mingle it or we'll shredder it.
Then we'll get a big frying pan or a pan with a good jet of oil.
Once we heat up the oil (at medium heat), we'll drink the onion and garlic. We'll let them cook for five minutes, stirring often.
After this time we'll add the fried tomato. We will also add the white wine chorrit and mix these ingredients well (without cover them, so that the production will be reduced a little).
We'll put the fire down and let the preparations cook for another five minutes.
Pay attention to the cooking time of the pasta. When it's finished, put out the fire and remove the pot from its place. Drain the leaves or plate of dough and preserve them momentarily.
Then open up the tuna cans and drain the liquid.
With the tuna already drained, we will get them into our salsa or pilling and we will help ourselves with a spatula or fork to crumple the bigger pieces of fish. Then we'll mix everything up.
We will then preheat the oven at 180 degrees, using the grill function (if they have them).
To bake our tuna lasagna, we'll get a suitable bowl for the oven. We will grease the bottom and internal walls and place a first layer of lasagna dough.
We will put out the fire from tuna production. We'll try the mix and if we have to, we'll scattering them.

We'll get the tuna lasagna into the oven and get it greased. Once inside the oven, we will get up to 200 degrees and cook from 10 to 15 minutes, closely monitoring the evolution of the plate. The idea is that she's gratified but without passing.

Add salt to your taste and remove till all ingredients are well combined.

Fold the mixture into the prepared mold. Take the mold to the pre-heated oven and purple for about 35-40 minutes, or till the cake is golden and firm to the touch. Once ready, remove the cake from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before crumbling.

and-zucchini-noodles.name: And Zucchini Noodles

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Run zucchini through a spiralizer to make noodles.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet. Add zucchini noodles, garlic, garlic powder, basil, salt, and pepper. Cook until fragrant and heated through, about 2 minutes.

and-hot-fudge-sauce.name: And- Hot Fudge Sauce

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions:
Place 2 cups semisweet chocolate chips (about 12 oz.) in a medium heatproof bowl. Combine ¾ cup light corn syrup, ½ cup whole milk, 2 tsp. vanilla extract, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a small saucepan. Bring to a simmer over medium heat, whisking often to dissolve corn syrup, about 5 minutes. Immediately pour over chocolate chips and let sit uncovered 2 minutes, then whisk until smooth.
Do Ahead: Hot fudge sauce can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill.

and-spicy-cocoa-shrimp.name: And-spicy Cocoa Shrimp

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Heat 3 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a large skillet over medium. Cook 1 medium onion, finely chopped, and 4 garlic cloves, finely grated, stirring often, until onion is softened and fragrant, about 4 minutes. Add ⅓ cup double-concentrated tomato paste, 2 Tbsp. chili powder, 1 Tbsp. unsweetened cocoa powder, 2 tsp. smoked paprika, and ½ tsp. cayenne pepper and cook, stirring constantly, until paste starts to stick to bottom of pan, about 2 minutes. Stir in 2 tsp. all-purpose flour, then gradually pour in 1¾ cups low-sodium vegetable broth, whisking constantly. Bring mixture to a simmer.

Add juice of 1 medium lime, 2 Tbsp. dark brown sugar, and 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt and stir until sugar and salt are dissolved. Add 1½ lb. large shrimp, peeled, deveined, and cook, stirring constantly, until just opaque and slightly curled, about 5 minutes. Taste shrimp mixture and season with more salt if needed. Remove from heat.
Top shrimp mixture with cilantro leaves and serve with tostadas and lime wedges for squeezing over if desired.

andalusian-picadillo-soup-grandmas-recip.name: Andalusian Picadillo Soup (grandma's Recipe To Cure Everything)

Sirve en un plato, las carnes desherbadas, el tocino, un poco de garbanzos y hortalizas. Sirve al caldo aparte y listo, es hora de degustar el puchero.

andalusian-sweet-porridge-or-polea-peque.name: Russian Sweet Porridge Or Polish
instructions: We cut our bread into small pieces. In a frying pan we put 225 ml of olive oil and fry bread till golden, the oil should be at medium temperature. We remove and reserve onto a plate with cooking paper to absorb the excess oil.
We put 1 liter of milk with the lemon skin and cinnamon branch and we have been boiling. Once it starts to boil, we put out the fire.
Colamos el aceite de haber frito el pan y ponemos en una cazuela. Incorporamos los 100 gramos de harina con la cucharadita de sal mezclados.
We froze constantly with some rods until it's well cooked and with a golden color.

We added the infusion milk that we had reserved, we will do it little by little while we continue to mix with the rods all the time, till we get a thick, light cream with no groove. It should be noted that as they get cold they will thicker even more.
We add 80 grams of sugar and two tablespoons of sweet anises, and we mix again till it's all integrated.
We put picatostes at the bottom of the ponds or the fountain, and we put hot pits onto them with a tablespoon.
We sprinkle with ground cinnamon or cane honey and serve.

andalusian-style-squid-recipe-comedera.name: Andalusian-style Squid Recipe
andalusian-style-squid-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de calamares a la andaluza

ingredients.item: 500 gr de calamares limpios y cortados en anillas

instructions: We start the recipe by mixing wheat flour, chewing flour, salt and pepper with taste.
In another bowl, mix the eggs till they are perfectly homogenous.
Pass the squids through the flour mix and then put them into a beamed egg and re-pass through the flour mix.
Warm the oil into a big frying pan with medium heat.
Fry the squids till they're golden and crispy, about 3 minutes from each side.
Once you withdraw from the fire, place them on absorbing paper to remove excess oil.
It serves hot, embellished with lemon slices.

andean-arepa-traditional-venezuelan-reci.name: Andean Arepa: Traditional Venezuelan Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 tazaa de harina de trigo (todo uso)

instructions: In a large bowl, it incorporates wheat flour, sugar, salt and baking powder. Mix to integrate.
Add the egg, melted butter and warm milk. Mix up till you get a consistent mass.
Fold for 7 minutes or till you achieve a smooth, slightly elastic and manageable mass.
Once ready, cover the dough with a clean cloth and let rest for 30 minutes.
Pasado ese tiempo, divide la masa en 6 porciones iguales.
It forms balls and clamps them to a disc about 10 cm in diameter and 1 cm in thickness.
Calienta una plancha a fuego medio y engrasa ligeramente.
Cooking each arepa between 7 and 8 minutes from each side or until it's golden and baked from inside.
Una vez listas, sirve calientes con mantequilla, queso o el relleno que desees.
Enjoy!

andes-mint-cookies.name: Andes® Mint Cookies
instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Grease 2 baking sheets.
Beat butter, white sugar, and brown sugar together in a bowl until smooth and creamy. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Beat in vanilla extract.

Whisk flour, baking powder, and salt together in a bowl. Gradually add flour mixture to butter mixture until dough is just-combined. Transfer dough to a resealable plastic bag, squeeze out excess air, and seal bag. Refrigerate until dough firms, at least 2 hours.
Divide dough into 42 portions and wrap 1 dough portion around 1 mint. Repeat with remaining dough portions. Place dough 2-inches apart on prepared baking sheets.
Bake in the preheated oven until edges of cookies are golden, 10 to 12 minutes.

Melt remaining chocolate mint candies in a microwave-safe glass or ceramic bowl in 30-second intervals in the microwave, stirring after each melting, for 1 to 3 minutes. Drizzle melted mint chocolate over cookies.

andouille-and-collard-greens-soup-with-c.name: Andouille And Collard Greens Soup With Cornmeal

ingredients.prep: ribs and stems removed, leaves torn (about 8 cups)

instructions: Heat 3 Tbsp. oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Cook andouille, stirring often, until browned all over, 5–8 minutes. Add onion and garlic and cook, stirring often, until onion is translucent, 5–7 minutes. Stir in ½ tsp. red pepper flakes, then, stirring constantly, gradually add cornmeal. Cook, stirring often, until cornmeal is slightly darkened in color and toasty smelling, about 5 minutes. Stirring constantly, gradually add broth and bring to a simmer. Add collard greens and lemon juice and partially cover pot. Reduce heat and gently simmer, stirring occasionally, until collards are tender and soup is thick, 35–45 minutes. Thin soup with a little broth if needed; taste and season with salt.

Meanwhile, pour water into a large saucepan to come 3" up sides and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to a gentle simmer and add vinegar. Crack an egg into a small bowl, then gently slide egg into water. Repeat with remaining eggs, waiting until whites are opaque before adding the next one (about 30 seconds apart). Poach until whites are set but yolks are still runny, about 3 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer eggs to paper towels as they’re done.
Ladle soup into bowls. Top with poached eggs and more red pepper flakes and drizzle with oil.

angel-bogeyman-of-the-convent-of-cos-tel.name: Angel Bogeyman Of The Convent Of Cos
angel-bogeyman-of-the-convent-of-cos-tel.original_name: Papão de Anjo do Convento de Cós
instructions: Do the syrup: place the water, sugar, cinnamon stick and the lemon peels in the robot glass and program at steam temperature (120.3.) on Mycook for 5 minutes at the inverted minimum speed (speed 2 on Mycook). Lie in a bowl and let it cool.
The cream: lay the yolks in the robot cup, add the water and sugar, attach the mixer accessory and program at 100.3., for 5 minutes, at speed 3 (speed 4 on Mycook). Put it in a bowl and book it.

Garnish a large form with margarine and sprinkle it with flour. Wash and clean the glass thoroughly, let it cool down, refit the mixer accessory, add the yolks and eggs and program at 37.3 Drop to the shape, take to the pre-heated oven at 180.3 Cut into slices, lie down in bowls, water with the syrup until it is soaked, pours over the sauce, sprinkles with cinnamon and serves decorated to taste.

angel-eyes-cookies-with-nutella-engelsau.name: Angel Eyes Cookies With Nutella (engelsaugen)
angel-eyes-cookies-with-nutella-engelsau.original_name: Galletas Ojos de Ángel con Nutella (Engelsaugen)
instructions: Beat both egg yolks with butter and, little by little, add the sugar glas. Then add the flour and salt.
To mix with your hands and get a smooth and homogenous mass. If the dough's too sticky, add some more flour. Then we wrapped the mass ball with clear film and chilled it for at least half an hour.

Meanwhile, we preheat the oven at 180-3) (up / down) or 160-3 (fan). We divide the chilled mass into two parts and form two thin rolls about 2 cm in diameter. We cut the mass rolls into pieces about 1 cm thick and form them into small balls. We place the balls in a baking plate with a little space between them and press a hole at the centre of each cookie with the handle of a kitchen spoon.

Wet cookies for about 12 minutes, till they are golden. Immediately after withdrawing them from the oven, it slightly deepens the hole while they are still hot as they tend to close a little while while baking. Let the cookies cool for about 15 to 20 minutes. It slightly warmes Nutella into the microwave to make it easier to distribute about cookies. Filling a pastry sleeve or a frying bag with hazelnut cream and filling with the cookie holes. If necessary, place Nutella cookies in the refrigerator for 30 minutes so that the pilling will be re-solidified.

angel-family-chicken-soup-with-matzo-bal.name: Angel Family Chicken Soup With Matzo Balls

ingredients.prep: peeled and cut into bite-size pieces
bones removed and meat cut into bite-size pieces

instructions: Place whole chicken in a large stockpot; add 6 cups water, carrots, celery, parsnips, onion, dill, and parsley. Add more water as needed to cover ingredients; bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Cook until chicken begins to fall apart, about 1 hour. Remove chicken from soup and reserve for another use.

Whisk eggs and oil together in a medium bowl; stir in matzo meal until well combined. Cover the bowl; refrigerate for 20 minutes. Gently roll matzo mixture into 1-inch balls; be careful not to over roll as this can make matzo balls tough.

Bring 1 quart chicken stock to a boil in a separate large pot; reduce heat to a simmer. Gently add matzo balls to stock; cook until tender, about 1 hour. Transfer matzo balls to pot with soup and vegetables; season soup with salt and black pepper.
Place some rotisserie chicken meat in individual soup bowls; ladle in soup and matzo balls.

angel-food-cake-argiro.name: Angel Food Cake
instructions: In a bowl, sift the flour, corn flour, salt and add 3/4 cup of the total ground sugar.
Save the rest of the sugar for the meringue.
Mix the solid materials with wire and put them aside.
In the mixer's bowl, add the whites and cremarium and at medium speed beat for 1.5 to 2 minutes until the meringue starts to make body and very soft peaks.
Gradually and as rain pour the fine sugar we have before grinding, strengthening the mixer's speed and beat for 4-5 minutes until the meringue is stabilized, polished and makes peaks standing.
Then, add the vanilla and after it is lost inside the meringue we stop the mixer.
The flour must fall into the mixture of the cake gradually and well sifted.
Add the flour to the meringue and fold gently with a soft spatula from the bottom up carefully without losing the meringue volume.
Drop the sieved flour in 3 doses.
Carefully pour the Angel food cake into a deep cake pan with 25 cm diameter.

angel-fruit-trifle.name: Angel Fruit Trifle
instructions: Rinse blueberries in a strainer with water; shake off excess water. Spread blueberries onto paper towels; dry slightly.

Spread a layer of angel food cake chunks in a trifle or deep clear glass bowl. Scatter chopped strawberries in a thin layer over cake layer, followed by a layer of blueberries, a layer of chopped peaches, and a few fresh raspberries. Dollop a layer of whipped topping. Repeat layers until all cake and fruit has been used. Finish trifle with a layer of whipped topping.
Cover trifle and refrigerate until chilled, about 1 hour.

angel-hair-bibimguksu.name: Angel Hair Bibimguksu

ingredients.item: (226 grams) very thinly sliced green cabbage

instructions: Whisk ½ cup (176 grams) gochujang, ½ cup maesil cheong (plum extract syrup), ¼ cup tuna extract sauce, ¼ cup distilled white vinegar, ¼ cup toasted sesame oil, 3 Tbsp. minced garlic, 3 Tbsp. sugar, and 2 Tbsp. gochugaru together in a large bowl; set aside.

Bring 2½ quarts water to a boil in a large, wide pot. Add 12 oz. (340 grams) angel hair pasta and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened, about 4 minutes. Drain the noodles and rinse under cold running water until chilled. Drain and gently squeeze the noodles to remove excess liquid.

Add the pasta, 2 Persian cucumbers (160 grams), cut into 3" matchsticks, and two-thirds of 4 cups (226 grams) very thinly sliced green cabbage, to the bowl with the sauce. Using your gloved hands, gently toss the mixture until the noodles and vegetables are evenly coated with the sauce. Divide the pasta among individual serving bowls. Spoon any sauce left in the mixing bowl around the pasta, then sprinkle with 4 tsp. sesame seeds, toasted. Top with the remaining 1 Persian cucumber (80 grams), cut into 3‑inch matchsticks, remaining one-third of 4 cups (226 grams) very thinly sliced green cabbage, and 2 or 3 hard-boiled large eggs, halved. Serve with lemon wedges.

angel-pap-with-pomegranate-teleculinaria.name: Angel Pap With Pomegranate
instructions: Uncategorize tins with margarine and start the oven at 180 degrees. In a bowl, beat the yolks very well with the mixer for 20 minutes until they become quite bulky. Divide it by the tins and put it in the oven until it's cooked. Remove from the oven, deform and reserve.
Put the sugar in a pot, add the orange liqueur, the water and the orange peel, take it to the fire and boil until you get the yarn point. Take it out of the fire and let it cool.
Pass the angel talk through the syrup and throw them in a deep bowl. Water with the rest of the syrup and lead to cold. Then serve decorated with pomegranate berries.

angel-talk-teleculinaria.name: Angel Talk
instructions: Light a pot with sugar and water, add the lemon peel and cinnamon stick and boil for 20 minutes, remove it from the fire and let it cool.

Connect the oven to 180 In a bowl, beat the yolks well with the egg until it triples the volume and becomes a cute, off-white mixture. Divide it through the tins without filling too much and take it to the oven for 12 minutes.
Take it off, peel it off and let it cool. Then pierce the base of angel talk with the tip of a knife, place them in a deep bowl, add cold syrup, let it rest for a while and serve.

angels-cabbage-salad.name: Angel's Cabbage Salad
instructions: Whisk oil, vinegar, sugar, and soy sauce together in a small bowl until sugar dissolves. Set aside.
Toss cabbage, green onions, almonds, sunflower seeds, and raisins together in a large bowl; drizzle viniagrette over top and toss to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap; refrigerate at least 1 hour before serving.

angelas-awesome-chicken-enchiladas.name: Angela's Awesome Chicken Enchiladas
instructions: Place chicken into a large pot and add water to cover. Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer until chicken is no longer pink and the juices run clear, about 10 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read 74°C (74 degrees C).
Remove from the pot and let sit until cool enough to handle; shred chicken with two forks.
Combine sour cream, condensed soup, and chili powder in a saucepan. Bring to a simmer over medium heat, stirring occasionally, then turn off the heat and cover to keep warm.

At the same time, melt butter in a skillet over medium heat. Add onion; cook and stir until translucent, about 5 minutes. Add shredded chicken, water, 1/2 of the green onions, green chiles, and taco seasoning; simmer for 10 minutes. Stir in lime juice, onion powder, and garlic powder; simmer for 10 more minutes.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Stir 1 cup soup mixture into the skillet with the chicken. Spread remaining soup mixture over the bottom of a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Fill each tortilla with 1/5 of the chicken mixture and about 5 tablespoons Cheddar cheese.
Roll tortillas around filling and place enchiladas, seam-side down, into the baking dish. Pour enchilada sauce over top and sprinkle with remaining Cheddar, remaining green onions, and olives.
Bake in the preheated oven until filling is heated through and cheese is melted and bubbling, about 25 minutes.

angeletti-italian-christmas-cookies.name: Angeletti (italian Christmas Cookies)
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Grease a large cookie sheet.
Whisk together sugar, butter, milk, eggs, and vanilla in a large bowl until blended.

Mix flour, baking powder, and salt in a medium bowl. Add to the wet ingredients and stir until evenly blended. Cover the surface of the dough with plastic wrap or waxed paper and let stand for 5 minutes.
With floured hands, shape dough by level tablespoon into 1-inch balls. Place balls 2 inches apart on the prepared cookie sheet.

Bake in the preheated oven until puffed on top and light brown on the bottom, 7 to 8 minutes. Remove from the oven and transfer cookies to a wire rack to cool, about 30 minutes. Shape remaining dough into cookies and baking instructions.

Whisk together confectioners' sugar and water in a small bowl until blended. Dip the top of each cooled cookie into the glaze, then place on a wire rack set over waxed paper (this will catch any drips.) Immediately sprinkle cookies with candy sprinkles. Allow glaze to set for about 20 minutes.

angies-dilly-casserole-bread.name: Angie's Dilly Casserole Bread
instructions: Soften yeast in warm water; let stand 10 minutes.

Mix cottage cheese, sugar, butter, 1 teaspoon salt, and baking soda together in a large mixing bowl. Add dill seed, dried onion, egg, and yeast mixture; mix well. Gradually add flour, about 1/4 cup at a time, stirring well after each addition. If dough seems too sticky, add another 1 to 2 tablespoons flour.
Cover the bowl with a clean cotton kitchen towel and place in a warm place until doubled in volume, about 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Generously butter a 1 1/2- to 2-quart baking dish.
Gently stir dough to release bubbles. Transfer to the prepared baking dish.

Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, about 35 minutes. Remove from the oven; brush the top with melted butter and sprinkle on a pinch of salt. Leave in the pan for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.

anise-bagel-lezzet.name: Anise Bagel
instructions: 1. Boil water and pineapple in a bowl.
2. Remove the water from another rough.
3. Take the yellow and flux of the egg.
4. Add Margarini melt and flour, coarse powder, salt, lemon juice and egg white.
5. knead the ear to get a dough in softness.
6. Provide small simit shape and index the lubricated tray.
7. Remove yogurt with the help of brush on the half.
8. On the half of the egg yolk and sprinkle the sesame.
9. Cook for 25 minutes in the oven, which is pre-heated to 200 degrees.

anise-biscotti.name: Anise Biscotti
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C. Line 2 cookie sheets with parchment paper or foil.

In large mixing bowl, beat sugar and butter until light and fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Combine brandy, anise extract and vanilla in a small bowl or measuring cup. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking powder and salt. Alternately add dry ingredients and brandy mixture to the butter mixture, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients. Stir in the almonds and aniseed.
Drop dough by spoonfuls onto prepared sheet, forming two 2 x 13-inch long strips on each sheet. Smooth dough into logs with moistened fingertips.
Bake about30 to 35 minutes or until golden and firm to the touch. Place cookie sheets on racks and cool completely. Reduce the oven temperature to 149°C.
Cut cooled logs on the diagonal into 3/4-inch thick slices using a serrated knife. Place slices on cookie sheets.
Bake for about 20 minutes, turning after 10 minutes, until dry and slightly brown. Remove to a rack and cool.

anise-cookies.name: Anise Cookies
instructions: Whisk flour, baking powder, and salt in a medium bowl. Using an electric mixer on medium speed, beat eggs, granulated sugar, butter, oil, and 1½ tsp. anise extract in a large bowl until smooth, light, and foamy, about 2 minutes. Reduce mixer speed to low and add dry ingredients; beat just to combine.
Roll tablespoonfuls of dough into balls with your hands. Space at least 1" apart on 2 large parchment-lined baking sheets. Chill until very firm, about 1 hour.

Arrange racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 350°. Bake cookies, rotating sheets halfway through if coloring unevenly, until golden brown around the edges and tops are firm, 10–12 minutes. Let cool.

When cookies are cool, whisk powdered sugar, remaining 1 tsp. anise extract, and 3 Tbsp. water in a large bowl until smooth (glaze should be the consistency of heavy cream; add water by the teaspoonful to loosen if needed). Gently toss cookies in glaze until lightly coated, letting excess drip back into bowl. Transfer to clean parchment-lined baking sheets (you can use a small offset spatula for this, but the glaze is pretty forgiving of any finger marks) and let sit until glaze hardens, about 2 hours.
Do Ahead: Cookies, without glaze, can be made 2 months ahead; store airtight and freeze.

anise-crisp-lezzet.name: Anise Crisp
instructions: 1. *Each the dough into the kneading container.
2. Add salt and pineapple and knead the olive oil with warm water.
3. *Open the dough in 3 mm thin with the help of roller on the lightly unified kitchen countertops.
4. Place the oily paper by pressing the tray.
5. *Tepsideki hamurdan rulet ile kareler kesin.
6. Spread the outline on it.
7. Cook until the oven is fried to 180 degrees.
8. Serve.
9. You can also sprinkle the pit or sesame on request.

anise-pizzelle.name: Anise Pizzelle
instructions: Beat eggs and sugar with an electric mixer until fluffy. Stir in the melted butter and anise extract. Combine the flour and baking powder; stir in gradually. Dough will be sticky.

Preheat your pizzelle iron according to the manufacturer's instructions. Drop batter by rounded spoonfuls onto the iron. Close and cook for about 90 seconds, or until steam stops coming out of the iron. Carefully remove and cool. Store in an airtight tin at room temperature.

anise-sauce-chinese-cuisine-lezzet.name: Anise Sauce (chinese Cuisine)
instructions: 1. Food recipes include steamed brocoli, cerealsellahana, a sauce that emits vegetables such as cauflower.
2. Dry and rub the orange peel.
3. Transfer 1 coffee cup olive oil into sauce pot with 1 cup sugar.
4. Roast until the sugar is thoroughly melted.
5. Add Tangerine or orange peel, 1 teaspoon pineson, 3 teeth crushed garlic, 3 coffee cups soy sauce and 6 coffee cups juice.
6. Boil a stone and leave the stove to boil for about half an hour.
7. Take away from January and leave to cool.
8. Transfer to a glass jar.
9. You can keep a week in the refrigerator.

aniseed-nuts-traditional-recipe-of-paros.name: Aniseed Nuts, Traditional Recipe Of Paros

ingredients.item: 1/4 tablespoons of mastic beaten with some sugar
1/4 tablespoons of mastic beaten with some sugar

instructions: First we activate the yeast.
In a bowl, add the yeast crushed and the lukewarm water.
Mix to melt the yeast.
Add 11⁄2 cup of the total flour. Mix with a spoon to become a thick porridge.
Cover the bowl with yeast and allow it to stand for 20’ to activate the yeast.
In the mixer's bowl, add the remaining flour and aromatics: Anise, mastic and clove.
Add the oil and ouzo as well as the yeast mixture.
We start kneading at low speed at first. Ferment with the dough hook for 2’-3’ at low speed to combine the ingredients.
Strengthen the mixer by adding salt and maybe a little more water until the dough is collected in a ball around the hook. The dough must be tight. Ferment total around 13’-15’
When the dough is done and does not stick to the hands, put it in a large, slightly oiled bowl.
Cover it very well and leave it in a warm place for about 2 hours until it swells and doubles.
Remove the dough on the counter and ferment with the hands to deflate.
We split her at four.
We're making four long blocks.
We wet the surface and roll them into sesame.
Put them in a baking pan with non-stick paper to rise again, covered for about half an hour.
We break the paper so they don't stick together.
Once inflated, after about 30’-40’, with a knife, cut the anise nuts into slices 11⁄2 to 2 cm thick.

aniseed-almond-meringues.name: Aniseed-almond Meringues
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°. Toast 1 Tbsp. aniseed in a dry small skillet over medium heat, tossing often, until fragrant, about 2 minutes; let cool. Using an electric mixer on high speed, beat egg whites until frothy, about 1 minute.

With motor running, gradually add granulated sugar and beat until medium peaks form, 8–10 minutes. Then gradually add powdered sugar and beat until stiff peaks form, about 5 minutes longer. Fold in aniseed.
Spoon meringue onto a parchment-lined baking sheet, top with almonds and more aniseed, and bake until dry, 2–2½ hours. Turn off heat and let cool in oven.

anisette-toast.name: Anisette Toast
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Mix flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt together in a bowl; set aside. Grease 2 baking sheets.

Beat butter and sugar with an electric mixer in a large bowl until fluffy. Beat in one egg until completely incorporated, then another. Beat in last egg along with the anise extract. Mix in flour until just incorporated. Divide dough into two 12-inch long logs, 1/2-inch thick; place on prepared baking sheets.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden and firm to the touch, 20 to 25 minutes. Remove from the oven, and allow to cool, 5 minutes.
Cut into 3/4-inch thick slices using a serrated knife, and place cut-side-down onto the baking sheets.

Bake 5 to 10 minutes until the bottoms turn golden brown. Turn cookies over, and continue baking until golden brown on the other side, 5 to 10 minutes more. Cool completely on a wire rack before serving.

ankara-pan-lezzet.name: Ankara Pan
instructions: 1. Firstly roasted by adding liquid oils and cities in the ceiling.
2. Cook it in the jealous fire until it will be planted and softened.
3. Taste with salt and spices.
4. Cook the chopped meat in the form of medium-sized parts into another pot and add some fat.
5. Add fine chopped onions and continue to fade.
6. Add cut peppers according to the size of the meat in the sauce.
7. Again add cut tomatoes and continue cooking.
8. Add tomato paste and salt and cook until the material softens.
9. Taste Tuzla.
10. Take the barley city you previously roasted into the serving plate and prepare the presentation by adding meat.
11. 11. You can serve Ankara pan with pepper pickles and peppers, which are very fast.
12.  Afiyet olsun.
12. August What are the Diamond Points of the Ankara Ceiling? You can cook the meat in the pots with already whistle, and at the last stage you can fry in the oven.
14 July You can increase the flavor by adding wavy and grated tomatoes into the rice prepared with the city.
15. For the absence of meat hard, add the salt latest during cooking.
16. To add a aromatic taste, you can choose a barley onions instead of normal onion.
17. September To shorten the cooking time, you can add a spoon vinegar to the broth.
18. You can taste with spices such as mint and thyme.
19. September 1 Portion Ankara Pan How Calorie?A serving of 200 grams of Ankara pan is about 205 calories.
20. This meal, which is derived from vegetables, can also be added to dietary lists.
21. The size and type of the meat you will use can vary depending on the calorie value.
22. If you wish, you can also try the recipe of maklube prepared with beef.
23. If the local dishes offered with the Turkish tour appeal to your taste, you can browse the recipe of the Black Sea, the most famous flavor, and discover new tastes.

ankara-pan-recipe-lezzet.name: Ankara Pan Recipe
instructions: 1. Düdüklü take the pan into the pot and heat it thoroughly.
2. Place each side by placing lamb pearls in the pot yüshort s&uuml in fire;reli mühür.
3. After receiving meats color & add water to your car.
4. Close the cover of the pot and sprinkle between 45 minutes–1 hour, meats from the bone to comfortableç to the consistency to be separated.
5. Take the barley city to a large pot and roast the colors from adding oil to döne.
6. Add butter and olive oil and mix the butter until completely melt.
7. Add the chopped onion of food and roast to light-and-gray; to soften.
8. Add fine sliced spike peppers and so on.
9. Mix by adding grated tomatoes.
10. Add sugar, salt and pepper and flavor.
11. 11. Add and mix meat water and water.
12. Place the lamb pearls from the kerosene to the city üzerine.
12. August Close the cover of the pot and cook about 15 minutes in the middle fire.
14 July After receiving from January, serve by listening to short süre.
15.  Afiyet olsun.

anklets-argiro.name: Anklets
instructions: Place honey, juice and sugar in a pot, simply heat and melt.
Remove from heat and add the nuts, sesame and spices.
Mix well, make the mixture uniform. They let the filling cool well.

anns-fantastic-fruit-salad.name: Ann's Fantastic Fruit Salad
instructions: Mix grapefruit, orange, apples, pineapple, maraschino cherries, and grapes in a large bowl. Mash slightly with the back of a wooden spoon to release juices. Add bananas, coconut, walnuts, and sugar; stir to coat. Cover and refrigerate to blend flavors, at least 1 hour.

anns-rice-pilaf.name: Ann's Rice Pilaf
instructions: Dissolve chicken bouillon in water in a bowl.
Melt butter in a skillet over medium-high heat. Cook and stir vermicelli pieces until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Pour bouillon mixture into the skillet with the vermicelli.
Stir rice, black pepper, salt, and Greek seasoning into the vermicelli mixture and bring to a boil. Cover and reduce heat to low; simmer until rice is tender and liquid is absorbed, 20 to 25 minutes.

annas-banana-cacao-nut-muffins.name: Anna's Banana Cacao-nut Muffins
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 12-cup muffin tin or line cups with paper liners.

Use a wooden spoon to mix butter into the mashed bananas in a large mixing bowl. Mix in sugar, egg, and vanilla extract. Sprinkle baking soda and salt over the mixture and blend in. Add all-purpose and whole wheat flours; mix just until combined. Gently mix in coconut, walnuts, cacao nibs, and flax seeds.
Spoon batter into the muffin tin.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 20 minutes.

annes-fabulous-grilled-salmon.name: Anne's Fabulous Grilled Salmon
instructions: Double up layers of aluminum foil to make a 'pan' large enough to hold salmon fillet; place onto a baking sheet. Arrange fillet, skin-side down, in foil 'pan.'

Whisk basil, honey, lemon juice, oil, soy sauce, shallots, Worcestershire sauce, and ginger together in a small bowl until combined; pour over salmon fillet and marinate for about 20 minutes. Meanwhile, preheat an outdoor grill for medium-low heat.

Slide the foil pan holding salmon fillet off the baking sheet onto the preheated grill. Grill, covered, until salmon flakes easily with a fork, but not too dry, 10 minutes per inch of thickness, about 20 minutes. Slice fillet, using a spatula to scoop fillet off the skin. The skin will stick to the foil and your grill will remain clean.

annes-roasted-green-beans.name: Anne's Roasted Green Beans

ingredients.item: Sea salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Toss beans with olive oil in a medium mixing bowl until well coated. Spread beans out on a rimmed baking sheet or in a roasting pan. Sprinkle lightly with salt and pepper.
Roast in the oven until beans look shriveled and browned, about 20 minutes.
Remove beans from the oven, gather into a pile, and squeeze lemon juice over the top. Toss and serve.

annies-fruit-salsa-and-cinnamon-chips.name: Annie's Fruit Salsa And Cinnamon Chips
instructions: To make the salsa: Mix strawberries, apples, kiwis, raspberries, fruit preserves, white sugar, and brown sugar together in a large bowl until thoroughly combined. Cover and chill in the refrigerator while you make the cinnamon chips.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line two baking sheets with parchment paper.

To make the chips: Stack tortillas on a work surface; use a sharp knife to cut through the stack four times making eight wedges in each tortilla. Arrange wedges in a single layer on the prepared baking sheets. Spray wedges with cooking spray, sprinkle with desired amount of cinnamon sugar, then spray again.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden and crispy, 8 to 10 minutes. Allow to cool approximately 15 minutes on the baking sheets, then serve with chilled fruit salsa.

annies-turkey-brine.name: Annie's Turkey Brine

ingredients.item: Celery leaves and diced celery stalk from the inside of a bunch

instructions: Stir water, apple cider, brown sugar, orange slices, salt, celery, rosemary, garlic, bay leaves, and thyme together in a stock pot; bring to a boil and cook 5 minutes. Cool brine completely before using to brine turkey.

annies-venison-chili.name: Annie's Venison Chili

ingredients.item: Diced tomatoes with green chile peppers

instructions: Sauté onion and garlic in a large soup pot over medium-high heat until onion begins to brown, about 5 minutes. Add venison; cook until browned, about 7 minutes.

Add diced tomatoes with green chiles, black beans, kidney beans, pinto beans, tomato sauce, beef broth, cumin, oregano, paprika, chili powder, sugar, black pepper, and red pepper flakes. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer until flavors meld, at least 30 minutes.

annies-white-chocolate-kahlua-creme-brul.name: Annie's White Chocolate-kahlua® Creme Brulee
instructions: Preheat oven to 149°C (150 degrees C).
Whisk egg yolks and 1/3 cup white sugar together in a bowl until smooth.
Bring 1 3/4 cup plus 2 tablespoons heavy cream to a simmer in a saucepan over medium-high heat, about 5 minutes. Add white chocolate. Remove from heat and whisk until chocolate is melted.

Spoon 2 tablespoons of cream mixture into egg yolks, whisking constantly to prevent eggs from scrambling. Pour remaining cream mixture over egg yolks, whisking until custard is thick and smooth. Stir in vanilla extract and coffee liqueur.
Pour custard into four 6-ounce ramekins. Arrange ramekins in a 9x13-inch baking pan. Pour in enough warm water to come 1 1/2 inches up the sides of the ramekins.
Bake in the preheated oven until custard is set, about 45 minutes. Cool to room temperature, about 30 minutes. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate until chilled, about 2 hours.
Set oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven's broiler.
Arrange ramekins on a baking sheet. Sprinkle 1 teaspoon white sugar over each custard.
Broil in the preheated oven until sugar is melted and crispy, about 2 minutes. Chill before serving, 5 to 10 minutes.

anniebells-peach-cobbler.name: Anniebell's Peach Cobbler
instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Line a pie plate with 1 of the prepared pie pastries.

Whisk brown sugar, 1 cup white sugar, 1 tablespoon cinnamon, ginger, and nutmeg together in a bowl. Stir reserved peach liquid, water, and melted butter into sugar mixture until sugar dissolves into liquid. Stir in peaches.
Spoon peach mixture into prepared pie plate and place remaining pie pastry over the top; pinch and crimp edges together. Dot with butter pieces, remaining sugar, and remaining cinnamon.
Bake in the preheated oven until crust is light brown, about 45 minutes.

annona-mousse-teleculinaria.name: Annona Mousse
instructions: Drain the gelatin leaves in water for 7 minutes. Peel the anons and remove the lumps with the aid of a spoon. Then reduce the pulp to puree and mix the lemon juice.
On the side, firmly tap the cream until you get a whipped cream, adding some sugar if you want. Involve later with the anonna mashed potatoes.
Escorra as folhas de gelatina e leve-as a derreter no micro-ondas, sem deixar ferver. Incorpore-as depois no creme, mexendo muito bem.
Distribute the mousse by individual bowls or lie in a large bowl and take it to the refrigerator until solidifying. Serve decorated with lemon zest and mint leaves.

antakya-kombesi-lezzet.name: Antakya Kombesi

ingredients.item: Powder of a fiske drop gum  u

instructions: 1. Heat oven 180 degrees.
2. Mix margarine and sugar in a wide container.
3. Add and mix vanilla, drop gum powder and egg white.
4. In addition to flour and start kneading.
5. When it comes to ear nozzle consistency, your dough is ready (not more than one, add azar and leave it added when it comes to the consistency of ear nozzle).
6. Put a piece of dough into the size of walnut into wooden molds.
7. Open for it and close the dough 1 dessert spoon from the palm mixture.
8. Push the pattern back and hit the end of one place, the cookie will drop to your hand.
9. Do all in this way.
10. Bake very light pink in heated oven.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

antalya-beta-recipe-lezzet.name: Antalya Beta Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 cups boiled dry beans (preferably sugar beans)
1 medium size dry onion (in the form of chopped, half a month)
Instead of classic sugar beans, you can use dry barbunya or nohut.
A more practical seçforek için canned white beans,can use haşlama süresini reduce.

Vegan is a version of için the egg you can completely store ç

You can use yogurt sauce or olive oil lemon sauce instead of the Tahin.
You can add garlic powder or fine chopped green onions to reduce the yellowms or a different flavor.
You can use avocado oil or nuts oil instead of olive oil.
Instead of lemon juice, you can add a different taste with delicate sour or apple vinegar.

instructions: 1. Soak the beans from the evening, rub the next gü until the softener.
2. (It is easy to peel off the shoulders, için boiled & cold water döyou can.
